title: A high-end game character promo poster, vertical composition, ultra-close-up hal
prompt:
A high-end game character promo poster, vertical composition, ultra-close-up half-body special shot. The central figure is a stern, enigmatic young male fantasy character with fluffy silver-white tousled hair, strands fine and richly layered, topped with prominent white wolf ears or beast ears, exuding a cool, dangerous, restrained vibe. Only half his face is revealed, the other half obscured by a massive futuristic sniper rifle or heavy mechanical weapon, creating intense visual pressure. Just one eye shows, sharp, quiet, with a hunter's oppressive gaze.

The character wears a high-collared combat suit and light armor in deep blue, black, and metallic gold accents, premium materials blending leather, metal, mechanical armor structures, and faintly glowing energy components. The collar rises high to encase the neck, shoulders armored in rigid plates, the outfit heavy, austere, and precise in texture. The weapon looms close to the lens, dominating the right side of the frame in a vast sweep—designed as a futuristic sniper rifle with black-gold metal framework, intricate engravings, segmented mechanics, blue-glowing energy chambers or targeting modules, details intricate, fusing high-tech with Honor of Kings fantasy flair.

Background: A hazy, cool-toned fantasy battlefield or distant castle ruins, softly blurred, built from blue-grays, mist, faint glows, and far-off firelight for atmosphere. Air drifts with snowflakes, shattered ice, light motes, white particles, evoking cold, desolate, hushed stillness. Lighting from behind and upper side casts soft backlighting and rim light, illuminating edges of silver-white hair and weapon metal, adding depth to the figure. Overall palette: Cool blues, gray-whites, deep navy, metallic black, with hints of dark gold—cinematic vibe strong.

On the poster's left, integrate a large swath of Chinese calligraphy-style title text, strokes sharp and ink-splashed bold, deep blue ink texture; beside it, small vertical Roman letters and layout notes, forming a game character name poster design. Below, add slender fine-print slogan and English typesetting, styled like a top-tier MOBA mobile game's hero promo poster. Top can feature a subtle gold game brand mark or abstract emblem, bottom with centered series tagline layout.

Style Keywords: High-End Game Poster, Male Hero Character, Half-Face Obscured Composition, Ultra-Close-Up Special Shot, Silver-White Wolf-Ear Youth, Futuristic Sniper Rifle, Cool-Toned Cinematic Feel, Honor of Kings Style, Chinese Ink Title, Blue-Black-Gold Palette, Snow Particles, Fantasy Battlefield Backdrop, Refined Hair Strands, Piercing Gaze, High-Detail Materials, Premium Mobile Game Promo Visuals, Epic Scope, Oppressive Intensity, Cool, Mysterious, Ultra-HD Details.

title: Create a highly realistic live-action cosplay photo of Frieren. The image should
prompt:
Create a highly realistic live-action cosplay photo of Frieren. The image should be vertical and shot from a high angle, with the camera positioned slightly in front of and above the subject, looking downward to create a subtle wide-angle perspective. The subject looks up directly at the camera, giving her head a slightly larger appearance and her body a slightly smaller one, creating a cute small-face effect.

The subject is a young adult woman in her early 20s, portraying Frieren from Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End in a high-quality live-action cosplay style.  she is standing in a narrow nighttime street space beside Japanese vending machines, with both feet planted, her head slightly raised as she looks up at the camera, and both hands gently extended to her sides. It should feel as if she was called out to at night and turned her head upward toward the photographer, with a touch of cuteness and slight shyness.

The background must preserve the everyday atmosphere of a Japanese street at night: glowing vending machines, a parking sign, concrete pillars, street pavement, and red-and-white roadside posts should all be visible. The overall environment should be dim, with the main ambient light coming from the cool blue-white glow of the vending machines and a small amount of street lighting. The subject’s face and upper body should be clearly illuminated by a smartphone flash or close fill light, making her stand out from the darker background. The image texture should feel like a real nighttime smartphone snapshot, with a slight social-media beauty filter, but it should not become pure CGI or overly studio-like. Mild shadow noise, local sharpening, and the imperfect realism of a genuine night photo are all welcome.

The overall mood should be quiet, dreamy, cool-toned, and distinctly Japanese, with the feeling of “unexpectedly encountering Frieren by a vending machine late at night.” Be sure to preserve the high-angle overhead composition, the nighttime vending-machine setting, the smartphone-flash look, the authentic street atmosphere, and the clear recognizability of Frieren’s live-action cosplay.

The center features a detailed anatomical illustration of the animal with thin line callouts labeling its body parts. Surrounding the center are various data modules including: a 'Classification' box with icons, a 'Top 5 Amazing Facts' numbered list, a 'Size Comparison' silhouette against a 180cm human, a 'Diet' section with small illustrations of food sources, and a 'Detail Focus' sidebar with four circular close-up macro images of specific features. title: Create a premium, highly believable Surreal Menu / Food Concept Board for an ima
prompt:
Create a premium, highly believable Surreal Menu / Food Concept Board for an imaginary food concept called [CONCEPT NAME].

The goal is to make the food concept feel visually irresistible, culturally sharp, slightly absurd, and completely art-directed, as if it were a real restaurant concept, cult pop-up, editorial food project, or fictional menu people would obsess over online.

This should feel like a mix of menu design, food branding, visual storytelling, and trend-aware surrealism.

Concept details:
- Concept name: [CONCEPT NAME]
- Food category: [CAFE / BAKERY / DESSERT / FAST FOOD / FINE DINING / NIGHT SNACKS / DRINKS / HYBRID]
- Core idea: [WHAT MAKES THE FOOD CONCEPT UNIQUE]
- Culinary mood: [PLAYFUL / MELANCHOLIC / LUXURY / CHAOTIC / DREAMY / RETRO / FUTURISTIC / IRONIC]
- Audience: [AUDIENCE]
- Main appeal: [WHY PEOPLE WOULD BE ATTRACTED TO IT]
- Cultural vibe: [GEN Z / INTERNET-CORE / RETRO DINER / QUIET LUXURY / ART SCHOOL / Y2K / HYPER-POP / TOKYO CAFE / EUROPEAN EDITORIAL]
- Reality level: [BELIEVABLE BUT STYLIZED / CLEARLY FICTIONAL / DEADPAN REAL / HIGH-CONCEPT SURREAL]

Board structure:
Build the concept board like a premium menu-meets-branding layout.

Include sections such as:
- concept title
- hero dish or signature item
- menu categories
- item names
- short dish descriptions
- ingredient or flavor notes
- optional pricing
- visual dish callouts
- chef note or concept statement
- optional service style, packaging, or ordering cues

For the menu writing, include:
- imaginative but believable item names
- concise, stylish descriptions
- strong flavor or texture cues
- culturally fluent menu language
- a balance between absurdity and real-world food branding
- names and descriptions that feel screenshotable and memorable

Include:
- a strong concept title treatment
- premium menu hierarchy
- believable food naming logic
- beautifully structured categories
- hero visual emphasis
- polished editorial composition
- distinct concept personality
- strong shareable food-worldbuilding energy

Visual direction:
- Make the board feel like a real cult menu, fashion-food crossover concept, or editorial restaurant launch piece
- Emphasize desirability, visual appetite, weirdness, and aesthetic taste
- Balance believable food design with surreal or fictional charm
- Make it suitable for social sharing, concept art, pop-up branding, internet food culture, or visual storytelling
- The result should look like a genuine menu concept people would want to visit, repost, and discuss

Art direction:
- Style: [EDITORIAL FOOD CAMPAIGN / CULT CAFE MENU / RETRO DINER REINVENTED / LUXURY FOOD BOARD / WEIRD INTERNET MENU / ART SCHOOL CULINARY CONCEPT]
- Color palette: [PALETTE]
- Typography feel: [RETRO MENU / MINIMAL SANS / ELEGANT SERIF / PLAYFUL DISPLAY / EDITORIAL MIX]
- Material feel: [PRINTED MENU / LAUNCH POSTER / FOOD CONCEPT BOARD / CAFE BRAND SHEET / EDITORIAL MENU CARD]
- Lighting or image mood: [FLASH FOOD EDITORIAL / SOFT NATURAL / LUXURY STUDIO / MOODY NIGHT CAFE / CANDY-COLORED POP]
- Background: [TABLETOP / STUDIO BACKDROP / PAPER TEXTURE / TRAY SURFACE / GRADIENT / INTERIOR SCENE]

Composition:
- Show the board as one cohesive food-concept object
- Make the concept name, hero item, and menu structure instantly readable
- Use strong menu hierarchy and editorial composition logic
- Make the food feel iconic, oddly desirable, and culturally charged
- Make the final output feel like a premium fake menu concept with viral potential

Output quality:
- ultra-detailed
- visually structured
- culturally fluent
- aesthetically believable
- polished food styling
- strong hierarchy and spacing
- premium menu composition
- instantly shareable visual concept

Optional content blocks:
- chef manifesto
- special edition menu stamp
- tasting notes
- serving ritual
- dish icons
- packaging preview
- opening hours
- location tag
- limited menu badge
- fake reservation cue

Avoid:
- generic menu design
- weak dish naming
- fake-looking food descriptions
- cluttered layout
- random typography choices
- amateur restaurant branding
- too much copy fighting the visuals
- overly corporate food language unless intentionally chosen
2/6

title: Create a high-resolution 8K portrait poster in an Urban Fashion Editorial Collag
prompt:
Create a high-resolution 8K portrait poster in an Urban Fashion Editorial Collage style, blending contemporary street-fashion aesthetics with premium editorial magazine design. The overall composition should feel bold, stylish, modern, and visually layered, combining elements of luxury fashion campaigns, urban culture, and artistic collage experimentation. Incorporate dynamic poster ornaments and decorative elements that strongly reflect the Urban Fashion Editorial Collage aesthetic, such as ripped paper textures, layered magazine cutouts, abstract geometric accents, expressive brush strokes, typography fragments, street-style graphic overlays, halftone textures, tape effects, paint splashes, handwritten scribbles, and fashionable editorial layout compositions. Every decorative element should feel intentional, stylish, and visually balanced rather than overcrowded. Humanity really looked at torn paper and graffiti textures and decided, “yes, this is luxury now.” Somehow it works.

The subject’s pose must not resemble the reference photo. Create a completely different body posture and facial expression with a more natural, expressive, and emotionally alive presence. Avoid stiff, awkward, flat, or overly symmetrical posing. The subject should radiate the confident elegance of an international fashion model, with fluid body language, subtle movement, and a cinematic editorial attitude. The expression should feel charismatic, effortless, fashionable, and modern, as if captured during a high-end streetwear magazine photoshoot rather than a static studio portrait. Add slight motion energy through posture, clothing movement, hand placement, camera angle, or gaze direction to make the composition feel more alive and dynamic.

The outfit must feature modern casual fashion with a stylish and trendy urban aesthetic. Avoid monotonous clothing design, colors, or materials. Combine fashionable layers, contemporary cuts, unique textures, stylish accessories, and varied color palettes that complement the poster composition. The clothing should feel premium, youthful, and fashion-forward, inspired by global streetwear and luxury casual editorial styling. Mix different fabric materials, patterns, and tones naturally to create visual richness without making the outfit look chaotic or overly exaggerated.

Use dramatic editorial lighting with strong contrast and depth to enhance the fashion atmosphere. The background should integrate seamlessly with the collage elements, creating a visually immersive poster composition filled with layered urban energy and modern fashion identity. Maintain a clean balance between subject visibility and decorative complexity so the poster still feels premium and professionally art-directed. The final result should look like a sophisticated international fashion campaign poster with a strong urban editorial character, ultra-detailed textures, crisp focus, cinematic color grading, and highly polished visual quality in ultra-detailed 8K resolution.

title: A high-end futuristic streetwear fashion poster featuring a faceless avant-garde
prompt:
A high-end futuristic streetwear fashion poster featuring a faceless avant-garde model floating and leaping through the sky. The model wears an oversized beige puffer jacket with layered hoods and a knitted face mask completely covering the face. The lower outfit consists of loose white cargo pants layered with exaggerated light blue and dark blue stacked denim leg warmers, paired with beige sneakers and a black crossbody shoulder bag.
The composition uses an extreme low-angle perspective shot, making the legs and shoes appear dramatically enlarged for intense visual impact, as if the character is jumping directly over the viewer’s head. The pose feels anti-gravity and surreal — one arm stretched outward while one leg kicks forward dynamically, creating a floating airborne motion.
The background features a bright cyan-blue sky with soft white clouds, illuminated by clean sunlight and strong atmospheric depth. The overall visual style blends luxury fashion editorial photography, surreal streetwear advertising, and experimental urban poster design.
Add two smaller collage-style silhouette versions of the character in the top-right and bottom-left corners — one floating in the air and another mid-jump — creating the feeling of a fashion magazine collage layout.
Poster layout should resemble a square luxury magazine cover adapted to a 9:16 vertical composition. Add massive abstract rounded typography at the top inspired by Y2K bubble fonts and experimental streetwear brand logos. Include a small graffiti-style brand mark on the left side. On the right side, place a white handwritten brush-style slogan reading: “RISE ABOVE WITH FASHION”, followed by tiny editorial-style caption text underneath. Add a small barcode centered at the bottom.
The design should include thin white borders and a soft off-white paper texture overlay.
Style keywords: futuristic street fashion, avant-garde clothing design, Y2K graphic design, magazine cover typography, collage silhouettes, extreme low-angle shot, sky background, surreal floating motion, exaggerated perspective, premium streetwear campaign, realistic fabric texture, ultra-detailed, clean luxury aesthetic.
Aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical.

title: [PROMPTSREF]
prompt:
[PROMPTSREF]

Act as a Senior Brand Art Director and Editorial Poster Designer creating a horizontal editorial campaign poster where bold typography and photography are unified across a split-layout composition. The poster is deeply rooted in [BRAND NAME]'s real brand identity — colors, typography character, campaign language, and visual codes drawn from actual brand materials and campaigns.

IMPORTANT LIMITATION: Do not attempt to generate real identifiable people by name. Instead use a realistic figure whose appearance, clothing, and context are entirely consistent with [BRAND NAME]'s campaign aesthetic — wearing [BRAND NAME] products visibly, in an environment associated with the brand.

---

PHASE 0: BRAND INTELLIGENCE — STRICT BRANDBOOK ACCURACY

Perform a complete brand decode of [PROMPTSREF] from training data. Apply all of the following with maximum fidelity:

COLOR SYSTEM — ZERO APPROXIMATION: retrieve the exact official brand colors of [PROMPTSREF] as documented in their public brand guidelines and campaign materials. Identify: primary background color — the color [PROMPTSREFE] most commonly uses as the dominant background in campaign posters and editorial materials. Primary headline color — the color used for large display type. Secondary information color — the color used for small body text, labels, and informational copy. Apply these exactly. Do not substitute or approximate. Examples: Gucci uses cream/off-white background (#F5F0E8) with deep red (#8B0000 to #CC0000) for headlines. Nike uses white background with black headlines and red accents. Adidas uses black background with white headlines. Supreme uses white or red background with the opposing color for type. A brand designer must confirm these colors are correct for [PROMPTSREF].

TYPOGRAPHY CHARACTER — PRECISE VISUAL DESCRIPTION: identify whether [PROMPTSREF] uses serif or sans-serif type and describe its precise visual character — do not name a font, describe how it looks and feels. Gucci: classic high-contrast serif with strong thin-thick stroke variation, elegant and editorial, similar in character to Bodoni or Didot. Nike: geometric sans-serif, bold, uniform stroke weight, condensed, no contrast between strokes. Adidas: clean grotesque sans-serif, slightly condensed, utilitarian and athletic. Supreme: perfectly geometric sans-serif, circular O, uniform stroke weight, Futura-like. Balenciaga: ultra-extended grotesque, extremely wide letterforms, uniform stroke weight. Louis Vuitton: refined serif with moderate contrast, luxury editorial character. Apply this visual character description to generate type that feels authentically correct for [BRAND NAME]'s brand category — luxury serif for heritage fashion houses, athletic grotesque for sportswear brands, geometric for streetwear.

CAMPAIGN LANGUAGE — REAL SLOGANS ONLY: extract the single most famous, most documented real campaign slogan of [BRAND NAME]. Not an invented phrase. Not a generic motivational line. The actual trademarked or documented slogan used in real campaigns. Examples: Gucci — "We Will Always Be Yours". Nike — "Just Do It". Adidas — "Impossible Is Nothing". Puma — "Forever Faster". Use this real slogan as the headline text broken across 2 to 3 lines.

BRAND FACTS: extract real founding year, key event names, real campaign names, product line names, geographic origin city, and documented campaign dates. Use this real data as all informational micro-copy. No invented data.

---

PHASE 1: LAYOUT ARCHITECTURE

Single horizontal rectangle — aspect ratio 16:9. Two zones split at approximately 55 to 60% from the left edge.

Left zone: pure flat background in [PROMPTSREF]'s exact primary campaign background color from PHASE 0. NOT automatically white — the color is whatever [PROMPTSREF] actually uses in their campaign materials. No photography, no texture, pure graphic design.

Right zone: full-bleed editorial photograph bleeding to right, top, and bottom edges.

TYPOGRAPHIC BRIDGE — CRITICAL: the headline type starts in the left zone and physically crosses the split line continuing over the photograph. Type appears simultaneously on the brand background AND over the photo. The largest headline line crosses the split most dramatically — it spans the full width of the poster. This bridge unifies the two zones into one composition.

---

PHASE 2: HEADLINE TYPOGRAPHY

Real [PROMPTSREF] campaign slogan from PHASE 0 broken into 2 to 3 lines. Typography character matches the visual description from PHASE 0 — serif for luxury heritage brands, grotesque for sportswear, geometric for streetwear.

Line 1: medium-large, starts in left zone, crosses into right zone over the photo. Uppercase. Primary headline color.

Line 2: maximum size — 35 to 45% of total poster height. The single most dominant visual element of the entire poster. May bleed slightly off the left edge — leftmost letter partially cropped. Crosses the split line fully, spanning both zones. Primary headline color.

Line 3: large, ends with asterisk or registered trademark symbol as graphic accent. Primary headline color.

All lines left-aligned. Flat color, full opacity. No shadows, no outlines, no gradients, no effects. Type sits directly over the photograph at full opacity where it crosses into the right zone.

---

PHASE 3: INFORMATIONAL MICRO-TYPOGRAPHY

Small-scale type set in the same typographic character as the headline but regular weight. Small size, generous tracking. Secondary information color from PHASE 0.

Cluster 1 — brand event details: three label-value pairs stacked with real [BRAND NAME] data. Format: "EVENT" left-aligned, real event name right-aligned. "DATE" left-aligned, real campaign date right-aligned. "LOCATION" left-aligned, real city and country right-aligned.

Cluster 2 — CTA: a short directional phrase in small caps with tracking — "DISCOVER THE EXHIBITION →" or "SHOP THE COLLECTION →" or similar. Positioned below Cluster 1 with clear spacing.

Both clusters positioned in the breathing space between headline lines in the left zone — they occupy the open area between Line 1 and Line 3.

---

PHASE 4: CORNER ELEMENTS

Bottom left corner: three-line brand attribution block — founding year, brand name in the brand's logotype style, geographic origin city (e.g. "1921 / GUCCI / FIRENZE, ITALIA"). Small type, left-aligned. If [BRAND NAME] has a recognizable wordmark — render the wordmark in its correct typographic style at this position.

Top right corner over photo: small cluster of event name, date range, and location. Small type, right-aligned, secondary information color.

Bottom right corner over photo: same event/date/location information repeated. Right-aligned, slightly larger than top right cluster.

Large numeral accent: a typographically significant number positioned upper right in the photo zone — founding year last two digits, collection edition number, or campaign year. Size: 15 to 20% of poster height. Primary headline color at 85% opacity. Below the numeral: the word "SINCE" followed by the full founding year — small caps, tracked out, secondary information color.

---

PHASE 5: PHOTOGRAPHY

A realistic figure — not a named real person — whose appearance and context are entirely consistent with [BRAND NAME]'s visual world. The figure is wearing [BRAND NAME] products visibly and recognizably. The environment is authentic to the brand's cultural positioning: Gucci — Italian Renaissance architecture, Florence rooftops, luxury interiors. Nike — athletic venues, courts, tracks, urban environments. Adidas — urban streets, sports arenas, creative studios. Supreme — New York streets, skate spots, urban environments.

Photographic style: editorial, naturalistic. Slight warm or cool grade depending on brand aesthetic — Gucci uses warm film-like grades, Nike uses clean neutral grades, Adidas uses high contrast neutral grades. Not stock photography. The figure is positioned slightly left of center within the photo zone, facing slightly away from camera or in profile — creating the characteristic editorial non-confrontational pose. The headline type from PHASE 2 overlaps the figure's body where it crosses into the right zone.

---

PHASE 6: COMPOSITION PRINCIPLES

Hard vertical split line — precise, no feathering, no blend, no gradient transition. Left zone is pure graphic. Right zone is photography. They meet at an exact vertical cut.

Typography hierarchy: Line 2 maximum > Line 3 > Line 1 > Large numeral > Corner elements > Micro clusters.

Visual flow: large type enters from left → crosses into photo → numeral accent upper right → corner information → figure.

Left zone negative space: generous — micro-typography clusters are small relative to the zone. The white or colored space breathes around the type.

---

PHASE 7: TECH SPECS

title: Create a realistic indoor smartphone mirror selfie. A young adult woman stands b
prompt:
Create a realistic indoor smartphone mirror selfie. A young adult woman stands beside a bright window in front of a mirror, posing sideways while turning her head back toward the phone camera in the mirror. One hand holds a light-colored smartphone near her face, partially covering one side of it; the other hand rests naturally on the back of her thigh or near the hip-thigh area, with fingers lightly touching the leg. The pose is a typical side-profile mirror selfie: a slight back arch, subtle hip shift, and weight placed on one leg, intentional but still casual.

She has dark brown hair with a subtle reddish-brown tone, tied into a loose low or mid-low bun, with a few wispy strands falling around her forehead and face. Her makeup is clean and polished: thin eyeliner, defined lashes, soft brows, a slight cheek flush, and muted rosy beige or nude-pink lips. Her expression is calm and restrained, looking into the mirrored phone camera with a slightly cool, self-aware mood.

She wears a deep burgundy fitted long-sleeve top, with a high-neck or mock-neck design. The fabric is soft, stretchy, matte, and closely follows the arms and torso. The bottom is black high-waisted fitted shorts, hugging the hips and upper thighs, creating a clean color-block contrast between burgundy, black, and exposed skin. Visible skin includes the face, neck, hands, wrists, upper thighs below the shorts, and part of the legs above the knees; the shoulders, chest, abdomen, and waist are mostly covered. The skin tone is naturally warm-fair, softened by backlight and slight indoor shadows, with a fine, soft, warm, human texture rather than overly smoothed plastic skin.

The setting is an ordinary apartment living room or bedroom corner, with a large window, white window frame, cups and small objects on the windowsill, a gray sofa, papers or casual clutter on the sofa, a black mug, a decorative board leaning against the wall, and a light switch. The window light is very bright, almost overexposed white, while the indoor space is darker. The subject is lit by soft window bounce and indoor ambient light, creating a low-contrast, slightly underexposed gray smartphone look.

Use a vertical 3:4 mirror selfie composition, with the phone near the face and the subject framed from head to upper thighs. Keep slight casual framing offset, phone-camera compression, mild noise, and authentic lived-in room details. A gigantic mythical or energy-based construct surrounds them in a dynamic circular or spiral composition — celestial dragon, biomechanical entity, elemental serpent, sacred halo, divine relic, magical armor spirit, or cosmic energy manifestation — visually representing the character’s elemental affinity, combat style, and narrative symbolism.
The environment contains volumetric god rays, glowing particles, floating symbols, cinematic fog, reflective surfaces, layered architectural depth, magical energy trails, atmospheric bloom, and sacred cinematic lighting. Composition is symmetrical, centered, elegant, and designed like a premium luxury fashion editorial cover with large stylized typography elements that can be freely improvised by the AI.
The entire image MUST inherit the canonical color palette of the character, including lighting, energy effects, atmosphere, fabrics, reflections, particles, and environment.
Ultra realistic, cinematic fantasy, photorealistic, Unreal Engine 5, Octane Render, ray tracing, global illumination, HDR, volumetric lighting, depth of field, atmospheric perspective, masterpiece quality, ultra detailed, luxury editorial aesthetic, 8k.

title: Create a bold Y2K pop-street editorial collage featuring a young person as the c
prompt:
Create a bold Y2K pop-street editorial collage featuring a young person as the central subject, combining playful graffiti typography, orange poster background, sticker-like graphic elements, and fashion magazine layout energy.

MAIN SUBJECT AND FRAMING:
Place the young person on the right side of the composition in a close-up to upper-body portrait. The face should be large and dominant, cropped from the chest upward, with the subject slightly leaning forward into the frame. The composition should feel asymmetrical, with graphic typography filling the left side and the subject anchoring the right side.

Do not control or describe the hairstyle.

OUTFIT DETAIL:
Style the subject in a minimal black streetwear outfit. They wear a black turtleneck or high-neck top with a soft fitted silhouette, creating a clean dark shape against the bright orange background. Add a black beret or rounded cap with a small embroidered logo detail on the front, giving the look a stylish retro street-fashion feeling.

Add a small colorful cheek sticker or decorative bandage on one cheek, with cute tiny graphic details, making the styling feel playful and idol-like. Keep the outfit mostly black so the blue graffiti typography and orange background stand out strongly.

BEHAVIOUR AND BODY LANGUAGE:
The subject’s body language should feel calm, closed-off, and slightly moody. The shoulders are relaxed but slightly rounded forward, creating a soft guarded posture. The head tilts subtly downward and to the side, giving the portrait a cool detached attitude.

The subject does not need a big hand gesture in the main portrait; instead, the behaviour comes from the face angle, lowered posture, and intense sideways eye movement. The pose should feel like someone caught in a quiet bratty moment, not fully engaging with the viewer.

FACIAL EXPRESSION:
The expression is pouty, serious, and mildly irritated in a fashionable way. The lips are softly pushed forward into a small pout, brows slightly tense, and the eyes look sideways with a suspicious or unimpressed gaze. The mood should feel bratty, stylish, aloof, and quietly rebellious.

GRAPHIC BACKGROUND:
Use a saturated orange background with a large white starburst shape behind the subject’s head and shoulders. The starburst should create strong comic-book energy and make the face pop.

Add hand-drawn black scribble text across the orange background, like messy diary writing or lyric notes. Include phrases such as:
“EENIE MEENY MINEY MO”
“4:03”
“LOVE DAY”
“HIDE YOUR LOVE”
“BOYZ”
The handwriting should look playful, imperfect, thin, and chaotic, but still visually controlled.

MAIN TYPOGRAPHY:
Place a large blue graffiti-style word “Your Name” across the left-center area. The letters should be chunky, rounded, irregular, and outlined in thick black, like a playful bubble graffiti tag. The typography should overlap slightly with the subject’s face area without blocking the eyes.

Add pink star sparkle stickers around the face and cap area, giving a cute pop-idol accent.

BOTTOM FILMSTRIP:
At the bottom of the composition, add a horizontal filmstrip with four rectangular photo panels. These panels show smaller full-body and close-up poses of the same young person wearing the same black outfit.

Panel pose ideas:
1. Side close-up portrait with head tilted back slightly, cheek sticker visible, eyes looking away.

2. Full-body stance with legs apart, hands near pockets or belt area, posture confident and relaxed.

3. Repeated close-up side portrait for rhythmic collage effect.

4. Repeated full-body stance, slightly different angle or crop.

The filmstrip should feel like a fashion contact sheet or idol editorial preview.

MOOD AND STYLE:
The overall mood should be playful, bratty, nostalgic, and street-fashion inspired. It should feel like a Y2K teen magazine layout mixed with graffiti poster design, idol concept styling, and scrapbook-like pop graphics.

title: 请根据用户输入的【主题】或上传的【参考图片】，创作一张横向 4:3 的高完成度「AI美甲灵感方案 」。
prompt:
请根据用户输入的【主题】或上传的【参考图片】，创作一张横向 4:3 的高完成度「AI美甲灵感方案 」。

【输入规则】
如果用户提供的是文字主题，请根据主题进行抽象提炼。
如果用户提供的是参考图片：
- Image A 是灵感参考图，是本次美甲方案的核心灵感来源；
- 如果用户还提供了手部照片，则 Image B 为手部参考图，用于辅助生成更贴近肤色与手型的实际上手效果；
- 如果没有手部照片，请生成一组自然、真实、审美在线的通用女性双手上手效果图。

--------------------------------------------------
【图片标题与副标题】
主标题请明确写：
AI美甲灵感方案

英文副标题可写：
AI Nail Inspiration Board

小标题可根据主题自动生成，例如：
Inspired by [主题名称]
或
Visual Translation of [主题名称]

如果是中文主题，也可以中英结合，例如：
灵感来源 / Inspired by [主题]
主题转译 / Concept Translation

--------------------------------------------------
【整体版式要求】
横向 4:3 版式，整体采用高端提案板排版。

画面建议分为以下几个模块，并保持层次清晰、留白舒服、结构有秩序：

一、顶部标题区
二、灵感来源区
三、视觉元素提取区
四、10指甲设计区（核心主视觉）
五、风格总结区
六、推荐甲型 / 工艺 / 场景区
七、实际上手效果区（非常重要）
八、底部总结区

背景保持干净克制，可使用暖白、奶油白、浅灰、浅米色、雾粉灰等高级底色，不要过度花哨。
整体设计感应偏向高端美甲品牌视觉、时尚杂志内页、设计提案板，而不是电商详情页或低质海报。

--------------------------------------------------
【各板块详细要求】

① 标题区 / Title Area
在画面上方清晰呈现：
- 主标题：AI美甲灵感方案
- 英文副标题：AI Nail Inspiration Board
- 主题名称：根据用户输入自动生成
- 一句简洁的风格描述，例如：
“从主题中提取色彩、符号与情绪，转译为一整套可上手的美甲方案。”

标题区要简洁有力，体现高级感和设计感。

--------------------------------------------------
② 灵感来源区 / Inspiration Source
如果用户上传了参考图，请在左上或上方区域展示参考图缩略图，并标注：
- 灵感来源 / Inspiration Source
- 主题名称
- 简短说明：这次设计从参考图中提取了哪些气质与方向

如果用户只输入文字主题，则在此区域以文字方式呈现：
- 主题名称
- 主题简介
- 核心氛围描述

此区不是大篇文字，而是简洁专业、像设计说明一样。

--------------------------------------------------
③ 视觉元素提取区 / Visual Extraction
请将灵感拆解成几个清晰的小模块，排版精致、信息明确：

A. 色彩系统 / Color Palette
请推荐：
- 主色 3 个
- 辅助色 2 个
- 点缀色 1 个

用小色卡形式展示，并标注色彩名称。
色彩命名可偏审美化，例如：
奶杏裸粉、冷调银灰、酒红莓果、墨绿、雾霾紫、香槟金、深海蓝、珍珠白等。

B. 关键词 / Style Keywords
提炼 4—6 个关键词，例如：
温柔、神秘、复古、冷艳、梦幻、浪漫、华丽、克制、轻甜、未来感、松弛、清冷、戏剧感等。

C. 图案与符号 / Motifs
提取 4—6 个可被转译进甲面的视觉元素，例如：
月亮、星轨、花瓣、水波、羽毛、火焰、丝带、蝴蝶、格纹、书页、音符、金线、藤蔓、金属边框、玻璃碎片感等。

D. 材质与工艺 / Texture & Finish
提炼适合本次主题的工艺方向，例如：
猫眼、珠光、金箔、渐变晕染、镜面、果冻透感、法式边、贝壳碎片、磨砂、立体水滴、微浮雕、细闪、丝绒感等。

这一整区要非常像“设计逻辑提取板”，清晰、专业、简洁。

--------------------------------------------------
④ 10指甲设计区 / 10-Nail Design Plan
这是整张图的绝对核心，请占据最大视觉权重。

请明确展示：
- 左手 5 枚
- 右手 5 枚

每一个指甲都要单独清晰呈现，并附简洁说明。
建议每枚指甲包含：
- 指位（Thumb / Index / Middle / Ring / Pinky）
- 设计名称
- 简短说明（1句话）
- 主要元素 / 工艺

整套 10 指甲必须形成统一风格，同时又有节奏变化，不可十个都一样，也不可毫无联系地乱做。
既要有完整系列感，又要有细节差异和层次感。

--------------------------------------------------
⑤ 风格总结区 / Concept Summary
请在右侧或中右区域做一个小型总结模块，包含：

- 风格主题 / Style Theme
例如：
暗夜玫瑰 / Midnight Rose
海风日落 / Sunset Coast
旧梦电影感 / Retro Cinema Mood
春日书页 / Spring Pages
深海星轨 / Ocean Starline

- 整体气质说明
用 1 段简洁说明总结整套方案的方向，例如：
“这套设计通过低饱和主色、细节金属线条与局部珠光工艺，将灵感中的浪漫与克制感转译为更适合日常佩戴的高级美甲方案。”

--------------------------------------------------
⑥ 甲型 / 工艺 / 适用场景区
请做成小而精致的模块，包含：

A. 推荐甲型 / Nail Shape
根据主题与风格自动推荐 1—2 种合适甲型，例如：
- 短圆甲
- 方圆甲
- 椭圆甲
- 杏仁甲
- 中长椭圆甲

并简短说明理由，如：
“更显精致”“更适合日常佩戴”“更能承载图案层次”“更显手部修长感”。

B. 推荐工艺 / Recommended Finishes
总结这套设计最重要的工艺重点，例如：
渐变晕染、微珠光、金线细节、猫眼流光、局部镜面等。

C. 场景建议 / Best For
说明适合的场景，例如：
通勤、约会、婚礼、度假、节日、演唱会、春夏、秋冬等。

这一块要像“实用落地建议”，增强方案可执行性。

--------------------------------------------------
⑦ 实际上手效果区 / On-Hand Preview
这一部分非常重要，必须精致、真实、有说服力。

请生成一组高完成度的双手上手效果图，展示这整套美甲真正做在手上的样子。
要求：
- 双手自然、真实、比例正常
- 手部姿态优雅，不夸张、不僵硬
- 指甲细节清晰可见
- 光线柔和高级，具有棚拍质感
- 可采用自然摆拍方式

如果用户提供了手部照片，请尽量匹配其手部肤色与基础手型特征；
如果没有手部照片，请生成一组大众审美友好、气质自然、适合展示美甲的女性双手效果。

重点：
这不是简单的小缩略图，而是整张图中非常关键的落地展示模块。
要让用户第一眼就觉得：“这套设计真的能做，而且做出来会很好看。”

--------------------------------------------------
⑧ 底部总结区 / Final Note
请在底部或右下角写一句清晰有力的总结语，例如：

“这套方案并非简单复制灵感来源，而是提取其色彩、情绪与符号语言，转译为更适合甲面表达、同时兼顾美感与佩戴性的完整美甲设计。”

这句总结要起到“收尾 + 提升专业感”的作用。

--------------------------------------------------

最终请输出一张横向 4:3 的高完成度「AI美甲灵感方案」专业提案图。
用户第一眼应被这套美甲方案吸引，第二眼能看懂整套设计逻辑，第三眼会觉得这套方案真实可做、而且做出来会很好看。

title: A close-range flash-fashion portrait, with the subject’s body cutting diagonally
prompt:
A close-range flash-fashion portrait, with the subject’s body cutting diagonally across the frame. Her face is positioned low on the left side, while the body extends from the left shoulder, neck, chest, and abdomen toward the upper hips and faded blue denim on the right. The composition should feel tilted, unstable, and off-balance, like a 90s/Y2K fashion magazine, fitting-room, or temporary studio flash snapshot. Do not make it a clean commercial studio image.

The subject is a young adult woman in her 20s. She has dark brown, almost black hair, loosely tied or half-up, with many messy flyaway strands falling over her forehead and around the face. The flash catches tiny highlights in the loose hair. Her face remains on the left side of the frame. Her eyes look directly into the camera with a cool, distant, slightly dazed expression. Her lips are relaxed, softly closed or slightly parted, as if she had just turned toward the lens when the flash fired. Her makeup follows a 90s/Y2K fashion look: pale matte base, slight pink blush, minimal delicate eye makeup, natural lashes, nude-pink or soft rose lips, with a slightly washed-out flash-lit film complexion.

She wears a red-and-white gingham strappy crop top with thin straps, a fitted cropped structure, slight wrinkles along the bust edge, and a small side tie extending outward. The bottom is a pair of faded light blue denim overalls or loose jeans, half-worn and low-slung, with the white inner waistband, metal buttons, seams, and strap construction visible. The denim should look heavy, washed, textured, and naturally folded, as if it has not been fully adjusted yet. She wears glossy brown leather gloves: one gloved hand rests near the waist or hip, while the other gloved hand lifts toward the upper-right of the frame. Around the neck and collarbones are layered delicate metal necklaces with small pendants and a heart-shaped charm.

Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbones, shoulders, upper arms, upper chest edge, partial side chest, large abdomen area, side waist, skin around the navel, upper hip edge, and the low-waist denim area. The back, buttocks, and full legs are not visible. Her skin tone is fair and warm, appearing pinkish-white and slightly overexposed under the hard flash against the cold blue-green background. The skin should look smooth, soft, and warm, while keeping subtle real texture, natural abdominal transitions, and navel detail. It should feel like fine skin briefly lit by direct flash, not glossy plastic or heavily airbrushed.

The photography style is a 90s/Y2K film-flash snapshot, as if shot with a point-and-shoot film camera, early digital camera, or phone with a film emulation filter. A strong direct flash fires from slightly above-left of the camera, creating hard highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbones, upper chest edge, center abdomen, arms, and glossy brown leather gloves. The body casts a harder shadow onto the cold blue-green background. Keep visible film grain, slight overexposure, cool cyan-blue shadows, rough edges, and a scanned-film feeling. The background should stay plain and minimal, without furniture or complex environmental elements.

The mood feels like a temporary shoot where she had not fully adjusted the denim overalls yet; the red-and-white gingham crop top and loose denim are frozen mid-styling as the flash fires early, catching her cool gaze, messy hair, unfinished gesture, and raw clothing details. Aesthetic direction: 90s flash fashion, Y2K editorial, raw denim styling, cropped body portrait, cold blue film scan.

Negative prompt: perfect studio beauty shot, commercial ecommerce photo, plastic skin, heavy airbrushing, soft glamour lighting, perfect symmetry, oversexualized, exaggerated body, full body standing pose, clean minimal fashion ad, complex background, low detail fabric, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, warped waist, uncanny face, smooth AI gloss.

title: Create a candid night-out balcony portrait of a young adult woman captured waist
prompt:
Create a candid night-out balcony portrait of a young adult woman captured waist-up as she has just stepped outside for air. She exhales a slow stream of smoke, holding a lit cigarette in her left hand near slightly parted lips, eyes relaxed and half-lidded, not looking at the camera. Long, loose, glossy dark waves fall over her shoulders.

She wears a snug black ribbed knit tank with a deep V, lace-trim neckline and thin straps, plus layered thin gold necklaces (one with a small cross) and small gold hoop earrings. A narrow strip of midriff shows above black low-rise pants. Skin is light to light‑medium with a neutral-warm undertone; it should read soft, warm, and slightly dewy to the touch, with real pores and faint texture. Warm tungsten streetlamp light from camera-left/front paints amber highlights on cheekbones, collarbones and decolletage, while cooler urban ambient fills the opposite side; the smoke catches the light.

Pose her three-quarter to camera with a slight lean and head tilted back, chin up; right arm relaxed/out of frame. Shoot handheld with a smartphone-like feel: slightly low and close, three-quarter angle, medium close-up crop, 4:5 vertical. Keep imperfect realism—subtle high-ISO grain, mild motion softness in the smoke, and a left-edge intrusion from a wooden panel. Depth of field is moderate so the background stays readable yet soft.

Set the scene on a balcony above a quiet urban/residential street at night: wire railing lines, bare trees, warm streetlight bokeh, off-white buildings with a few lit windows, black night sky. The energy is intimate, moody, and slightly rebellious—she stepped out for a breath; the street murmurs below; in a moment she will flick the ash and drift back inside.

Must keep: night balcony, long dark wavy hair, black ribbed lace-trim tank with visible cleavage, layered gold necklaces with cross, cigarette and smoke, mixed warm/cool lighting, handheld smartphone realism with subtle grain, 4:5 vertical, eyes not at camera and head tilted back. Avoid: studio flash, daytime, heavy retouching, perfect symmetry, different hair color, removing smoke, telephoto glamour look, and big smiles.

title: Please generate an image based on the theme: “A stunning woman on a crowded comm
prompt: Please generate an image based on the theme: “A stunning woman on a crowded commuter train who makes people instinctively take a second look.” She is a 20-year-old Japanese woman with a refined beauty that naturally draws everyone’s gaze. She has soft, long black hair styled into a low ponytail. Large double-lidded eyes, a well-defined nose bridge, and subtly glossy, modest lips. Her face is small, with a long, elegant neck, and a slender yet feminine figure with gentle curves. Her outfit consists of a lightweight white shirt and a beige tight skirt. The shirt has a slight translucency with natural wrinkles. The scene takes place inside a crowded morning train. She is holding onto a strap, caught in a moment of slightly losing her balance. The shot is taken from a diagonal rear angle, from a passenger’s perspective, looking slightly upward. She appears natural and unaware of the camera. The image has a slight motion blur and rough framing.

title: 绘制图中角色的立绘等身立牌，放置在购物中心的一家游戏周边店的门口，背景虚化处理。
prompt:
绘制图中角色的立绘等身立牌，放置在购物中心的一家游戏周边店的门口，背景虚化处理。
绘制图中角色在立牌右，歪着头，双手比出心型，展现亲密感。图中角色画风保持不变，仿佛穿越到现实，确保光影效果，让图中的动漫画风少女能够完美的和写实背景融合。
所产生的新图片要保持角色发色，发型，服装剪裁，身材，配饰等和图片中一致，看起来就像是现实中真实存在的真人在cosplay一样，亚洲女性五官，脸瘦小精致，瓜子脸，年轻可爱，纯情又超级漂亮。身材苗条性感，有顶级模特的气质和身材，符合现实中的真人比例。
背景，包括立牌是写实画风，拍摄视角大光圈带来的浅景深将背景虚化，使观众的视线牢牢和她的眼神交流。
胶片颗粒感： 后期模拟胶片质感，增加画面的厚重感和颗粒噪点，去除数码味的生硬。电影感、叙事性、私密感、高动态范围。空气中要有轻微的丁达尔效应（体积光），表现出室内的尘埃感和温馨的雾气感，不要出现类似（谷子店）等商店名称，模糊处理。
重点，立牌和背后的人物虽然是一个（图一），但是画风不同，前面的是立牌，后面的是cosplay的真实少女，注意两者区别不要混淆，请仔细检查这一点。

title: 一颗【牛油果】，以博物学大师发现野外标本的方式解剖。
prompt:
一颗【牛油果】，以博物学大师发现野外标本的方式解剖。
剖开、展开、固定——如同博物馆的珍贵藏品，
却以卡拉瓦乔为《国家地理》掌镜时的光线照亮。
每一个内部结构都以自身的材质真相发光。
截面锋利得近乎暴力。内部美丽得近乎神圣。

画面中呈现完整标本：
一半保持原状，展示深绿粗糙鳄鱼皮质感外皮；
另一半剖开至核心，巨大圆润棕色果核清晰可见，
奶油黄绿色果肉从外皮渐变至果核，丝滑致密。
背景：纯粹的黑丝绒。牛油果悬浮其中。

标注文字紧贴结构边缘，手写感衬线字体，绝不悬空飘浮：

结构01：КОЖУРА

title: A close-range flash-fashion portrait, with the subject’s body cutting diagonally
prompt:
A close-range flash-fashion portrait, with the subject’s body cutting diagonally across the frame. Her face is positioned low on the left side, while the body extends from the left shoulder, neck, chest, and abdomen toward the upper hips and faded blue denim on the right. The composition should feel tilted, unstable, and off-balance, like a 90s/Y2K fashion magazine, fitting-room, or temporary studio flash snapshot. Do not make it a clean commercial studio image.

The subject is a young adult woman in her 20s. She has dark brown, almost black hair, loosely tied or half-up, with many messy flyaway strands falling over her forehead and around the face. The flash catches tiny highlights in the loose hair. Her face remains on the left side of the frame. Her eyes look directly into the camera with a cool, distant, slightly dazed expression. Her lips are relaxed, softly closed or slightly parted, as if she had just turned toward the lens when the flash fired. Her makeup follows a 90s/Y2K fashion look: pale matte base, slight pink blush, minimal delicate eye makeup, natural lashes, nude-pink or soft rose lips, with a slightly washed-out flash-lit film complexion.

She wears a red-and-white gingham strappy crop top with thin straps, a fitted cropped structure, slight wrinkles along the bust edge, and a small side tie extending outward. The bottom is a pair of faded light blue denim overalls or loose jeans, half-worn and low-slung, with the white inner waistband, metal buttons, seams, and strap construction visible. The denim should look heavy, washed, textured, and naturally folded, as if it has not been fully adjusted yet. She wears glossy brown leather gloves: one gloved hand rests near the waist or hip, while the other gloved hand lifts toward the upper-right of the frame. Around the neck and collarbones are layered delicate metal necklaces with small pendants and a heart-shaped charm.

Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbones, shoulders, upper arms, upper chest edge, partial side chest, large abdomen area, side waist, skin around the navel, upper hip edge, and the low-waist denim area. The back, buttocks, and full legs are not visible. Her skin tone is fair and warm, appearing pinkish-white and slightly overexposed under the hard flash against the cold blue-green background. The skin should look smooth, soft, and warm, while keeping subtle real texture, natural abdominal transitions, and navel detail. It should feel like fine skin briefly lit by direct flash, not glossy plastic or heavily airbrushed.

The photography style is a 90s/Y2K film-flash snapshot, as if shot with a point-and-shoot film camera, early digital camera, or phone with a film emulation filter. A strong direct flash fires from slightly above-left of the camera, creating hard highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbones, upper chest edge, center abdomen, arms, and glossy brown leather gloves. The body casts a harder shadow onto the cold blue-green background. Keep visible film grain, slight overexposure, cool cyan-blue shadows, rough edges, and a scanned-film feeling. The background should stay plain and minimal, without furniture or complex environmental elements.

The mood feels like a temporary shoot where she had not fully adjusted the denim overalls yet; the red-and-white gingham crop top and loose denim are frozen mid-styling as the flash fires early, catching her cool gaze, messy hair, unfinished gesture, and raw clothing details. Aesthetic direction: 90s flash fashion, Y2K editorial, raw denim styling, cropped body portrait, cold blue film scan.

Negative prompt: perfect studio beauty shot, commercial ecommerce photo, plastic skin, heavy airbrushing, soft glamour lighting, perfect symmetry, oversexualized, exaggerated body, full body standing pose, clean minimal fashion ad, complex background, low detail fabric, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, warped waist, uncanny face, smooth AI gloss.

prompt: 生成一张竖屏手机近距离人像照片：一位年轻成年女性在户外停车场或路边空间靠近镜头自拍，画面是紧凑半身近景，脸部占据上半部，身体微微前倾，头略向左倾，肩膀抬起，手中抱着几朵鲜红玫瑰。她直接看向镜头，眼睛明亮湿润，睫毛清晰，露齿甜笑，嘴唇是高饱和玫瑰红色，苹果肌有暖粉色腮红，妆容参考东亚流行审美里的甜美偶像妆：细腻底妆、卧蚕亮感、柔和眼线、自然但有存在感的睫毛，不要欧美重妆。  人物和 服装参考我发的图片  前景下方是一束红玫瑰，花瓣饱满鲜红，绿色叶片和花茎可见，玫瑰略微遮挡衣服，形成浪漫但真实的近距离前景。右耳可见金色链条耳环或金属耳饰，颈部有隐约金属项链反光。  摄影风格为手机近距离手持自拍或亲密视角抓拍，约9:16竖屏比例，镜头略低于眼睛或接近平视，带轻微广角透视，人物非常靠近镜头，肩膀和玫瑰贴近前景。使用傍晚或低角度午后阳光，强烈金橙色直射光从画面右前方打到脸颊、鼻梁、肩膀和腰侧，形成暖色高光；阴影偏深，带一点青绿色暗部色偏。整体画质要像复古手机照片，有柔焦、轻微噪点、压缩痕迹、局部过曝、暖色溢光，不要过锐，不要商业精修。  背景保留户外日常环境：青绿色天空、少量白云、横穿天空的电线、电线杆、停放的汽车、远处白色建筑群和山坡轮廓。背景不要太干净，车辆、电线和城市杂乱感必须保留。天空偏青绿色，人物和衣服被夕阳染成暖橙粉色，形成暖前景与冷背景的复古对比。  整体氛围像她已经收到了红玫瑰，正在车旁借着最后一段暖阳拍下纪念照；画面带有过去发生过的约会余温，同时她现在正靠近镜头笑着。保持甜美、明亮、亲密、真实的恋爱纪念照气质，构图可以稍微偏满、略有倾斜，不要完美对称，不要棚拍，不要塑料皮肤，不要冷白光，不要过度性感化身体，不要让人物显得未成年。

title: [BRAND NAME = CHANGE TO YOUR BRAND].
prompt:
[BRAND NAME = CHANGE TO YOUR BRAND]. 
Act as a Social Media Art Director and Digital Collage Artist specializing in bold, youth-oriented brand content for Instagram and digital campaigns. PHASE 1: CONCEPTUAL FRAMEWORK Create a dynamic digital collage that merges fashion photography with graphic design chaos. This is controlled rebellion – a composition that feels spontaneous and energetic while maintaining brand coherence. The aesthetic is anti-polished: torn edges, layered textures, hand-drawn elements, and bold color blocking that screams confidence and movement. PHASE 2: MODEL & PHOTOGRAPHY - Subject: One model (diverse casting, age 18-30) in a dynamic, confident pose - Pose Energy: 80% attitude, 20% natural – sitting, jumping, mid-motion, or power stance (avoid static standing) - Outfit: Street style/athleisure that aligns with [BRAND NAME] aesthetic – casual but styled - Hero Product: Feature 1 signature [BRAND NAME] product prominently (sneakers, bag, apparel) – this is the visual anchor - Photography Style: Editorial fashion cutout – model extracted from background with clean edges - Camera Angle: Slight low angle to empower subject (hero perspective) - Crop: Full body or 3/4 body showing hero product clearly - Background Removal: Model cut out cleanly for layering over collage elements PHASE 3: COLOR BLOCKING FOUNDATION - Primary Color Blob: Large organic shape (40-60% of composition) in bold, saturated brand color behind/around model - Shape Style: Irregular, hand-painted aesthetic – think Photoshop brush strokes or torn paper texture (NOT perfect geometric shapes) - Color Selection (Autonomous): Choose 1 hero color from [BRAND NAME] palette: - Texture: Visible brush strokes, grain, or subtle noise (15-25% opacity) – avoid flat digital fills - Placement: Blob positioned to frame model without obscuring key product details PHASE 4: GRAPHIC ELEMENTS LAYER Add 3-5 abstract graphic elements scattered across composition: - Element Types: - Color Palette: Use 2-3 accent colors total (main blob color + 1-2 contrasting tones from brand palette) - Placement: Asymmetric scatter – top-left and bottom-right zones primarily (avoid center crowding) - Scale: Mix small (5% of canvas) and medium (15% of canvas) elements – nothing overpowering - Aesthetic: Analog/handmade feel – imperfect circles, rough edges, visible texture PHASE 5: TYPOGRAPHY INTEGRATION - Brand Logo: Clean [BRAND NAME] logo placed in upper-left or upper-right quadrant (10-15% of width) - Slogan/Tagline: If [BRAND NAME] has an iconic slogan, integrate it using: - Supporting Copy: Optional 1-line descriptor (e.g., "A MOMENT OF YOUR STYLE") in smaller uppercase sans-serif - Type Treatment: Mix of aligned and slightly rotated text (2-5° angles) for dynamic energy - Hierarchy: Logo largest → Slogan medium → Copy smallest PHASE 6: TEXTURE & BACKGROUND - Base Layer: Off-white or light gray textured background (NOT pure white) - Texture Options (Autonomous selection): - Color: RGB 245-250 (near-white with warmth) – maintains brightness while adding depth - Treatment: Texture should be felt, not seen – enhances tactility without competing with foreground PHASE 7: COMPOSITION RULES - Layout: Asymmetric balance – model off-center, graphic elements counter-balance - Breathing Room: 15-20% negative space (textured background visible) to prevent claustrophobia - Layering Order: Background texture → Color blob → Graphic elements → Model (cutout) → Typography top layer - Focal Point: Model + hero product = primary focus (60% visual weight), graphics support (40%) - Movement: Diagonal lines and angled elements create directional flow (top-left to bottom-right or vice versa) PHASE 8: BRAND INTELLIGENCE (AUTONOMOUS) Autonomously adapt composition based on [BRAND NAME] personality: - Streetwear/Sportswear (Nike, Adidas, Supreme): - Luxury Streetwear (Balenciaga, Off-White, Gucci): - Beauty/Lifestyle (Glossier, Fenty, Skims): - Tech/Modern (Apple, Tesla, Beats): PHASE 9: SOCIAL MEDIA FOOTER (OPTIONAL) - Bottom Strip: Clean white or light gray bar at bottom 8-10% of frame - Content: Social media handles (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter) in small sans-serif - Layout: Three-column grid with platform icons or text handles - Aesthetic: Minimal and professional – contrast with chaotic collage above TECHNICAL SPECS: - Aspect Ratio: 4:5 (Instagram feed) or 1:1 (square social post) - Resolution: 2400x3000px minimum (high-quality for zoom and detail) - Color Mode: sRGB, vibrant saturation (Instagram-optimized) - File Aesthetic: Digital collage that mimics analog craft (Photoshop + hand-drawn hybrid) - Model Photography: 85mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth of field on original shoot (before cutout) - Style Reference: Nike social campaigns, Spotify wrapped graphics, Gen Z Instagram aesthetics, Hypebeast x streetwear collabs - Mood: Confident, energetic, youthful, authentic chaos, anti-corporate polish

title: Create a realistic low-resolution candid phone photo of two young adults descend
prompt:
Create a realistic low-resolution candid phone photo of two young adults descending an indoor shopping mall escalator, captured from a lower diagonal angle across the escalator. The composition should feel accidental and slightly imperfect, with the escalator handrail and glass side panel cutting across the foreground as a strong diagonal obstruction.

On the left, show a cheerful young man with short black slightly tousled hair, wearing a dark casual short-sleeve shirt. He is smiling genuinely while carrying several oversized PC hardware boxes pressed against his torso, including visible GeForce RTX 4080 graphics card boxes, ASUS or GALAX-style GPU packaging, and a large black AORUS monitor box. His face, neck, forearms, and hands are visible, with natural warm skin tone and practical tension in the hands from holding heavy boxes.

On the right, show a slim young woman standing slightly higher on the escalator, calm and composed, looking downward rather than at the camera. She has a neat short dark bob haircut with straight bangs, soft indoor shine, pale warm ivory skin, and an East Asian fashion-editorial inspired makeup style: smooth matte base, subtle eyes, and defined red lips. She wears a fitted sleeveless cream or beige knit top covered with small repeated dark text-like pattern, matching long patterned arm sleeves, and a short black pleated skirt with vivid blue and turquoise plaid paneling, blue trim, and a dark belt. Visible skin includes her face, neck, exposed shoulders, upper arms, a small neckline area, and partially visible thighs above the escalator rail. The skin should look natural and softly matte, as if smooth and cool to the touch, lit by ordinary overhead mall lights rather than beauty lighting.

The background is a warm brown wood or laminate wall panel area inside a mall or electronics shopping center, with vertical seams, reflective metal rails, glass panels, and a partial passerby shape near the edge of the frame. Use practical indoor mall lighting: soft overhead illumination, warm reflected light from the brown wall, weak uneven shadows, and broken reflections on the escalator glass and metal. Keep a deep phone-camera-like depth of field where the subjects, boxes, escalator, and background remain mostly readable.

The image should preserve compressed social-media photo texture: mild noise, softened details, slightly muddy colors, imperfect framing, and a believable candid snapshot feeling. The emotional tone is a funny, slightly surreal tech purchase moment: the man looks proud and happy after buying expensive gaming hardware, while the woman appears cool, stylish, and detached. It should feel like they had just bought the hardware and were caught by someone passing by before either noticed the camera.

A 20-year-old Japanese woman with overwhelming beauty that makes people turn their heads. She has dark chestnut layered long hair, naturally tied back.

She has large double-lidded eyes, a small and straight nose, small but plump and glossy lips, and a delicate small face with a clearly defined contour. Her figure is slim and tall, with an intelligent and elegant overall aura, while also showing soft and noticeable feminine curves.

The blouse is naturally slightly unbuttoned, creating a mature, refined, and subtly charming atmosphere. For the bottom, she wears a high-waisted gray pencil skirt and simple high heels. The overall styling is clean, polished, intellectual, urban, and has the feel of a high-end office lady.

The scene is set inside or near an office meeting room. In the background, there are elements such as a glass-walled meeting room, conference table, computers, documents, office chairs, and the interior of a city office building. She is standing in the meeting room, naturally talking with colleagues, or softly speaking while organizing documents. Her posture is relaxed, and she is not looking at the camera.

The camera angle should create the feeling of being secretly captured from a slight distance, from a diagonal front view, as if someone outside the meeting room or in the office area casually took the photo with a smartphone. The image should have a clear candid, sneaky snapshot, and casual street-photo feeling.

The composition should be slightly casual rather than carefully staged, with mild hand shake, slight blur, and imperfect framing, recreating the texture of a real smartphone snapshot.

The camera perspective should be slightly low-angle, subtly looking up at her, emphasizing her standing presence, aura, and attractiveness.

Overall, the image should be realistic, authentic, atmospheric, documentary-like, and have a 4K-quality look.

title: Ultra-realistic iPhone mirror selfie inside a sleek, dimly lit modern elevator,
prompt:
Ultra-realistic iPhone mirror selfie inside a sleek, dimly lit modern elevator, with the subject’s facial identity matching exactly the provided reference image. Full-body framing captured through the mirror, slightly wide perspective without distortion. The young woman stands at a subtle angle facing left, her head turned into a clean, defined side profile, lips gently pursed.

She holds her phone at chest level in her right hand, elbow slightly flared outward in a natural pose. In her left hand, she loosely carries an open paperback book resting against a deep burgundy skirt. Her hair is styled in a neat, slick low ponytail. She wears thin, transparent eyeglasses and white wired earbuds, with the cable draping down across her torso.

Outfit includes an oversized dark charcoal coat with broad sleeves layered over a grey hoodie and a black graphic sweatshirt. Accessories include chunky silver rings and a black quilted shoulder bag hanging from her left shoulder.

Environment details: dark matte elevator walls, stainless steel doors behind her, illuminated rectangular ceiling panels, vertical side light strips, and a control panel with buttons on the right wall. A metal mirror rail runs along the lower edge.

Lighting is cool and realistic, with accurate reflections, visible natural skin texture, and no beauty filters or smoothing effects. Clean, authentic iPhone mirror aesthetic.

prompt:

[CAR MODEL].

Place the car as the heroic central subject in a dynamic three-quarter side profile, visually dominant and impossible to ignore.

Show the full beauty of the vehicle with aggressive stance, perfect proportions, premium wheels, signature headlights, aerodynamic lines, spoilers, performance details, and luxury design language.

title: Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and l
prompt:
Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not alter the identity or structure of the main subject. Add playful, hand-drawn doodles that interact directly with the subject in the image. The doodles should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the shapes, gestures, or motion present-such as outlining poses, extending limbs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginative elements that

"respond" to the subject.

Ensure the doodles feel naturally integrated into the scene, as if they were drawn on top of the photo with intention.

Use a sketchy, imperfect, hand-drawn style with organic lines, slightly uneven strokes, and a casual illustrated feel.

Include whimsical handwritten text elements placed around the image. The text should match the mood or implied context of the scene, with a playful and spontaneous tone.

Avoid fixed phrases-generate context-aware, creative, and humorous text that fits each unique image. Maintain a balanced composition so the doodles enhance the image without overwhelming the original subject. Keep the overall aesthetic fun, expressive, and social-media-ready. High resolution, clean overlay, vibrant yet natural color harmony.

title: Create a high angle CCTV surveillance shot using the uploaded image as the sourc
prompt: Create a high angle CCTV surveillance shot using the uploaded image as the source. Detect every visible person in the image and automatically draw a white rectangular bounding box around each face. For the most prominent person, add a large zoom in inset: a sharp, enhanced close-up of their face displayed in a floating rectangular frame connected with a thin white line.Keep the main image slightly noisy and security camera like (soft grain, slight distortion, muted colors), while the zoom in face box should be clearer, brighter, and more detailed. No text, no timestamps, no overlays except the boxes and connecting line. Maintain the original scene layout, angle, and environment of the uploaded image.

high fashion editorial + luxury product photography + cinematic sports campaign

title: 一张可爱、治愈风格的手绘贴纸页，背景为纯白色。整体构图为整洁的 3x3 网格，共 9 个独立贴纸单元，以均匀间距排列，不显示可见网格线，并保留充足的留白空间。
prompt:
一张可爱、治愈风格的手绘贴纸页，背景为纯白色。整体构图为整洁的 3x3 网格，共 9 个独立贴纸单元，以均匀间距排列，不显示可见网格线，并保留充足的留白空间。

每个单元格中都包含一个风格统一的极简祖国人卡通角色：极简的抽象一下主要特征。角色的表情极简；
每个单元格中的角色都呈现不同的动作或姿态，并搭配一句简短的手写中文短语（例如：打卡、摸鱼、开会、加班、好困、无语、好饿、吃啥、没钱、迟到、下班、加油、画饼、拒绝、开摆），通过对话气泡、小牌子或手势互动来表现内容。

配色方面：每个单元格使用一种主导色，颜色从 红、橙、黄、绿、蓝、紫 中选择，色调柔和但饱和度较高，且仅应用于文字、对话框或少量小装饰元素。黑色线稿保持不变。不要使用渐变，全部为纯色平涂。

角色和文字位于每个单元格的中央或略微偏中心的位置，整体保留充足的呼吸感和留白。阴影要么完全没有，要么极其轻微。文字风格类似于小孩子随手写的字，俏皮可爱但仍然清晰易读。线条略微圆润。

整体风格：可爱（kawaii）、治愈、极简、手绘、Q版、扁平插画、贴纸包、表情包合集。

负面提示词（Negative Prompt）：
写实、3D、复杂背景、渐变、厚重阴影、可见网格边框、标准印刷字体、细致五官、凌乱排版、文字错误。

title: Cinematic Action-adventure game boss battle scene, Sekiro-style combat, single c
prompt: Cinematic Action-adventure game boss battle scene, Sekiro-style combat, single continuous shot, fast-paced with intense impact. A white rabbit adventurer stands at the center of a shattered ancient stone battlefield. Opposite stands a tall fox, dressed in flowing Eastern robes and wearing a dark mask, exuding an oppressive aura. It holds a long whip that sways slowly through the air. The battle erupts instantly. The fox dashes forward at high speed, its whip slicing through the air with sharp, explosive cracks. The rabbit precisely blocks with the frying pan, sparks bursting at the moment of impact. They enter a high-frequency exchange—continuous blocks, deflections, and pressure—forming a classic ARPG-style “posture combat” rhythm. Camera language: low-angle tracking, rapid forward movement, slight handheld shake on impact, with strong motion blur on the whip swings. The fox unleashes chained attack combinations: sweeping whip strikes, upward lash attacks, and long-range pulling strikes to control distance. The rabbit side-steps, rolls, and counters at close range, striking rapidly with the frying pan in tight melee. Mid-battle, everything suddenly pauses. The wind intensifies, sand spirals upward, and the atmosphere compresses dramatically. The fox leaps backward to create distance. Its body begins to emit a white glow—the ultimate move activates. Transformation begins—the fox rapidly expands, transforming into a massive white spirit fox. Its fur flows like misty clouds, its enormous body covering the entire battlefield, radiating overwhelming pressure. The camera pulls back, revealing the vast difference in scale. The giant fox raises its front paw and slams it down toward the rabbit with devastating force. At the moment of impact—shockwaves spread outward, the ground violently shatters, and sand explodes across the frame. Final shot: the rabbit is engulfed beneath the shadow of the massive fox’s paw. On screen, bold red calligraphic characters appear: “落命”

title: 请基于我上传的人像照片生成一张正式商务档案头像海报。保留人物真实身份特征、五官比例、脸型基础和整体气质，不要改变人物身份。
prompt:
请基于我上传的人像照片生成一张正式商务档案头像海报。保留人物真实身份特征、五官比例、脸型基础和整体气质，不要改变人物身份。

可以适度优化面部轮廓，使脸部线条更清晰、自然、上镜；平滑皮肤质感，减少瑕疵、暗沉和肤色不均，但不要过度磨皮，保留真实皮肤细节和自然光影。

请根据人物脸型设计一款匹配的商务发型。发型应干净利落、成熟专业、适合正式场合，发丝自然、有层次，不夸张。请为人物搭配正式商务穿搭，例如深色西装外套、白色或浅色衬衫，可搭配领带。整体造型应高级、简洁、专业、可信赖。

画面为正面半身肖像，人物居中，直视镜头，表情自然自信。背景为纯白色素色背景，光线柔和均匀，类似专业证件照、企业头像摄影或大学官网个人档案照。整体风格干净、正式、商务、高清写实摄影质感，方形比例 1:1。

画面下方预留简洁信息栏，并添加现代简洁排版文字：
姓名：[小泉柚奈]
身份/职位：[高级平面设计]
专业/部门/机构：[国际设计院]

重要文字规则：
如果用户输入的姓名、身份、职位、专业、部门、机构或其他需要显示在图片上的文字是中文或其他语言，请先将这些内容翻译成自然、准确、正式的英文，再放入图片中。除非用户明确要求保留中文，否则图片中不要显示中文文字。

排版要求：
第一行姓名使用深蓝色粗体大字号英文文字；第二行和第三行使用黑色常规字号英文文字。整体排版参考大学官网个人档案、学术会议人物介绍卡片或专业商务头像海报风格。

title: A candid, detailed photograph captured from the perspective of a vanity mirror s
prompt: A candid, detailed photograph captured from the perspective of a vanity mirror shows a biracial woman with green eyes taking a selfie. She has natural, tight, coiled curly hair that is styled up into a high, bouncy ponytail, with elaborate, laid edges and face-framing baby hair tendrils. She is smiling gently and looking off to her right, away from the phone. She is wearing a black, ribbed, off-the-shoulder bodysuit that features a sweetheart neckline. She is holding a gold iPhone Pro Max in her left hand, which is held up to frame her face, displaying a clean, white-tipped French manicure. She has thick gold hoop earrings and a delicate gold chain necklace with a small pendant. Her right hand is placed confidently on her hip. The background is a warm, neutral-toned room with a large vanity mirror framed by round, bright white globe lights. Reflecting in the mirror behind her is a vanity table with cosmetics, a vase containing dried pampas grass, and blurred elements of a room with natural light. Her makeup is well-applied, with detailed eyeshadow, eyeliner, thick lashes, and a natural gloss on her lips. The lighting is soft and even from the vanity lights. The image is a clear, sharp, high-resolution photo with natural film grain.

title: A realistic low-light smartphone restaurant portrait of a young adult woman sitt
prompt:
A realistic low-light smartphone restaurant portrait of a young adult woman sitting inside a warm cafe or restaurant at night. Use a close half-body composition, close to a 4:5 or slightly square-cropped phone photo ratio. The camera is around chest-to-face height, shooting from close range at nearly eye level or slightly above. Her face, shoulders, neck, hand, and upper body fill most of the frame. Do not make it a mirror selfie, do not add a phone covering her face, and do not turn it into a bright studio portrait.

She faces the camera with a slight body turn, holding a metal fork vertically near her chin and lips, as if she paused during dinner while talking or before taking another bite. Her eyes look toward the camera with a calm, soft gaze and a slight sense of curiosity or pause. Her lips are slightly parted or naturally relaxed, with no exaggerated smile. The moment should feel like someone sitting across the table casually took the photo, natural but lightly posed.

She has deep black-brown to natural black hair, loosely tied up or half-up, with natural volume at the crown and loose face-framing strands on both sides. The hair has a soft dark sheen under warm low light, with slightly blurred edges. Loose strands rest near the cheeks and neck, adding casual restaurant realism. Preserve her soft oval face, delicate features, large eyes, natural nose bridge, and gentle lip shape. Makeup follows a warm East Asian-inspired restaurant selfie style: translucent base, natural straight brows, thin eyeliner, soft under-eye detail, light pink blush, and rose-pink or muted bean-pink lips. Keep it low-contrast, clean, and soft, without heavy makeup or commercial retouching.

She wears a white thin-strap camisole top with lace trim, a small bow at the neckline, and tiny floral or dotted details, layered with a warm cream or ivory loose knit cardigan. The cardigan has visible vertical or open-knit texture and slips slightly off the shoulder, revealing the thin strap. The fabric should feel soft, warm, and textured; the cardigan shows fuzzy knit detail under warm light, while the camisole looks lighter and more delicate.

Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbone area, upper shoulders, a small upper-chest edge, hands, and wrists. Waist, abdomen, back, hips, and legs are not visible or covered by clothing. Her skin tone is light warm ivory to soft beige-apricot, appearing creamy and warm under yellow restaurant lighting. The skin on the face, shoulders, neck, and collarbone should look delicate, soft, and slightly translucent, feeling warm, clean, and lightly moisturized to the touch. Keep subtle low-light tonal shifts, soft pores, and natural shadows; avoid excessive smoothing or plastic skin.

The background is a nighttime restaurant, cafe, or indoor dining space decorated with plants. Include dense dark green indoor plants, warm yellow background lights, wooden partitions or window-like frames, softly blurred restaurant seating, dark wall surfaces, and subtle woven chair texture. The main light comes from warm yellow restaurant ceiling lamps and background lights, scattering from above and slightly behind, with weak environmental bounce from the front. It creates soft highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbone, and shoulders. Plants and dark background areas absorb some of the light, creating warm shadows around the skin edges. Background lamps filtered through plant leaves form soft yellow light spots and irregular leaf shadows.

Keep a low-light smartphone texture: soft edges, mild shadow noise, warm film-like grain, subtle haze, and slight compression. The face, hand, and fork are relatively clear, while background plants and warm lights are softly blurred. The overall mood is gentle, quiet, intimate, and warmly hazy, like she had been sitting in the restaurant for a while, holding a fork, pausing mid-conversation, and looking up at the photographer just as the photo was taken.

title: A highly realistic voyeuristic candid shot inside a typical Korean high school c
prompt:
A highly realistic voyeuristic candid shot inside a typical Korean high school classroom. Shot from an extreme low angle, almost at floor level, looking up through the gap between the underside and metal legs of the desk in the immediate foreground. This foreground desk creates a heavy, out-of-focus framing effect (shallow depth of field, f/1.4 lens).
The subject is a 16-19 year old Asian female student, wearing a slightly loose white short-sleeve button-up uniform shirt, a light brown plaid mini pleated skirt, white ribbed calf-high socks, and white canvas slip-on sneakers. She is sitting behind a wooden student desk in a relaxed, slouched posture, with her legs casually crossed at the ankles underneath the desk. She has long straight black hair with see-through air bangs. Her hands are paused mid-action, casually playing with the hair near her neck. She is not looking at the camera; her eyes are drifting off to the left in a daydreaming, distracted gaze with a soft, unguarded expression.
She has a natural Korean "glass skin" makeup look with subtle peach blush. The visible skin on her thighs, arms, and face is fair, porcelain-like, and smooth, looking cool and soft to the touch. Soft, diffused physical daylight from an off-camera left window naturally highlights the top of her right thigh and the left side of her face. The classroom has wooden floors, a large green chalkboard in the background, and a framed South Korean flag hanging above the board. The image captures a nostalgic, slice-of-life moment—she was lost in her own world while time stood still. Masterpiece, highly detailed, photorealistic, 35mm photography.

title: 一颗/一块/一枚【草莓】，以博物学大师发现野外标本的方式解剖。
prompt:
一颗/一块/一枚【草莓】，以博物学大师发现野外标本的方式解剖。
剖开、展开、固定——如同博物馆的珍贵藏品，
却以卡拉瓦乔为《国家地理》掌镜时的光线照亮。
每一个内部结构都以自身的材质真相发光。
截面锋利得近乎暴力。内部美丽得近乎神圣。
画面中呈现完整标本：
一半保持原状，展示【外表面描述：质感/颜色/纹理】；
另一半剖开至核心，【内部核心结构描述：最重要的1—2个内部视觉特征】清晰可见。
【补充1—2句该食物最具视觉张力的横截面细节描述】
背景：纯粹的黑丝绒。
【食物名称】悬浮其中，如同某件珍贵而危险的事物。
标注文字紧贴结构边缘，手写感衬线字体，绝不悬空飘浮。
画面包含以下标注，每处标注三行：第一行结构名称，第二行成分数据，第三行一句人话：
【结构01名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】

【结构02名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】
【结构03名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】
【结构04名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】
【结构05名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】

【结构06名称】
【成分／数据说明】
【这个结构在做什么，为什么重要】
省略其他如果有继续保持这个格式
主标题，左上角，暖象牙白大写字体：
【食物名称】·解剖

斜体副标题紧随其下：
【一句揭示这种食物本质的话，不超过15字】

整体气质：奥杜邦博物插画×卡拉瓦乔光影×有史以来最美的科学摄影。
4K精度，标本照明，极致内部细节。
没有任何临床感，一切都鲜活。
写实风格，非示意图，非卡通，非简化图解。
每一种材质都有真实的物理质感：
粗糙的、光滑的、湿润的、干燥的、致密的、疏松的。

title: Core Concept:
prompt:
Core Concept:
Redraw A-Train as a character from an American adult animated sitcom (similar to Family Guy, The Simpsons, or Rick and Morty).

Key Features to Retain:

Iconic Silhouette: Keep the specific hairstyle, signature color palette, clothing outline, and key accessories.

Personality: Maintain the character's original "vibe" or temperament.

Visual Language / Art Style:

Line Work: Bold, thick black outlines.

Eyes: Large white circular eyes with small black pupils (classic "googly" or "dot" eye look).

Features: Highly simplified facial features and anatomy.

title: Japanese negative film aesthetic, quiet indoor corner, soft natural light, sligh
This prompt combines all requirements from the two input images to guide the AI
prompt:
This prompt combines all requirements from the two input images to guide the AI to generate a photo with stylized, handwritten annotations.

1. Core Task
Observe the elements in the provided photograph and add meaningful, handwritten-style annotations and illustrations to enhance the composition.

2. Photo Content & Subject (Target elements for annotation)
Mom and baby (named "Ten-chan").

A baby standing up.

A Nemophila (Baby Blue Eyes) flower field.

A beautiful sky.

The general warm and cheerful atmosphere of spring.

3. Drawing & Aesthetic Rules (How it should look)
Medium: Use thin, messy, handwritten-style lines that resemble writing with a white gel pen.

Technique: The lines should be rough, appear to be drawn in a single stroke (one-line art style), and be intentionally uneven and natural (not machine-perfect).

Visual Guidance:

Add outlines that loosely trace the perimeter of key subjects.

Use handwritten arrows and dotted lines to create visual leading and guide the viewer's eye between elements.

Finish: The overall aesthetic must look like an Instagram Story (IG Story style) or a rough editorial memo in a casual fashion magazine. The vibe should be stylish yet effortlessly relaxed and casual ("nuke-kan" feeling).

Composition: Do not clutter the image. Add decorations discreetly and ensure enough "negative space" (margin) remains to keep the photo clear.

4. Annotation Content & Tone (What the text should say)
Format: The text must be Japanese handwritten script (use approximately 70% Hiragana and 30% simple Kanji for readability).

Content: Write very short, personal comments that sound like emotional monologues or casual diary entries (e.g., "So cute!", "Lovely day.").

Specific Context Rules (If applicable in the image):

If commenting on Drinks: Focus on taste, temperature, and mood (e.g., "Refreshing," "Gentle sweetness").

If commenting on Food: Focus on texture and deliciousness (e.g., "Moist," "The absolute best!").

If commenting on Space/Location: Focus on the vibe and atmosphere (e.g., "So relaxing," "A wonderful time").

If a general summary: Keep it very brief and emotional (e.g., "Too much happiness~").

5. Small Decorations
Discreetly add small, simple handwritten icons such as:

Hearts (♥)

Sparkles (✨)

Steam/Vapor lines (if applicable)

Small, simple kaomoji (e.g., simple cute faces)
