title: **Photography & Framing:**
prompt:
**Photography & Framing:**
A dramatic low-angle studio portrait, shot from a worm's-eye view looking up at the subject, mimicking a 35mm lens at f/5.6. The framing is slightly chaotic due to foreground interference. Heavy film grain and analog noise add raw texture to the image. 

**Subject & Pose:**
A young woman in her early 20s stands with a dominant power stance, leaning backward with her chest pushed forward. Her hands rest firmly on her hips. Her head is tilted back, eyes half-closed, looking down at the camera with an arrogant, condescending smirk. She has platinum blonde hair pinned up with loose face-framing strands. Her makeup is theatrical: sharp eyeliner, arched brows, and plum lips on pale skin.

**Clothing:**
She wears an open lavender structured blazer over a tight, faintly striped white button-up shirt. A dark tie is around her neck, secured with an emblem pin. She wears a high-waisted lavender mini skirt cinched with a black belt, and black sheer tights. The fabric pulls tautly across her chest.

**Foreground Interference & Action:**
Multiple external, disembodied hands are invading the frame. One hand pulls her dark tie outward, another grabs her thigh, and others hover near her waist and arm. Rings and mismatched nail polish are visible on these hands. The tension will escalate as they pull at her.

**Lighting & Atmosphere:**
Intense, physical split-lighting. A stark cyan/teal key light strikes from the lower left, creating harsh, cool highlights on her taut pale neck, jawline, and the grasping hands, while deep shadows map her bone structure. This contrasts aggressively against a deep, vignette-heavy crimson red studio backdrop. The vibe felt obsessive, claustrophobic, and highly cinematic, leaving a residue of dark femme fatale energy.

The scene shows 4 visible band members in school uniforms: a surprised teenage boy with messy short hair at guitar and vocal mic, a calm beautiful teenage girl with very long flowing light hair playing electric guitar in the foreground, a petite long-haired teenage girl at a keyboard, and a drummer in the back whose face is intentionally obscured by a soft blur. The studio has large windows revealing a city skyline at night, hanging ceiling lights, amps including a visible Marshall stack, a drum kit with a band logo on the bass drum, cables, and a wall sign reading “Beat Box.” Compose it as a printed manga spread with 7 panels total across 2 pages, including gutters, page borders, and page numbers 13 and 14 at the bottom. Left page: 3 panels — top panel with the shocked boy turning toward the girls and a large Japanese speech bubble saying “え!?”; middle panel is a close-up of the long-haired guitarist girl with a calm expression and a Japanese speech bubble saying “……別にいいよ”; bottom panel is a wider full-band rehearsal shot with all 4 members in the studio. Right page: 4 panels — top panel is an explosive performance shot with the boy singing and playing while the long-haired girl plays guitar, with large sound-effect text “ジャッ”; middle panel is a dynamic close-up of the long-haired guitarist playing intensely, with flowing hair, musical note symbols, radiant speed lines, and the keyboard girl visible in the back; bottom panel is a close-up of the boy’s stunned face with soft bokeh and a vertical Japanese speech bubble saying “……あれ”. Emphasize the emotional contrast: awkward surprise turning into admiration as the girl’s guitar performance changes the mood. Use monochrome only, no color, authentic manga lettering, cinematic framing, layered depth, and highly detailed hair and instrument strings.

title: A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly deta
prompt: A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired style with dramatic lighting and rich texture. At the center is a beautiful young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, and an elegant, calm but dangerous presence. Her face is mostly obscured in shadow and mystery. She wears an ornate black-and-deep-blue crystalline dress with lace, feathered and jagged organic details, semi-transparent flowing sleeves, and glowing blue highlights across the bodice and collar, as if infused with magic. Her right hand is raised slightly with an open gesture, while her left hand rests lower near her waist. Surrounding and partly growing from her are luminous blue butterflies and shard-like petals, creating a sense of transformation and corruption. Behind her looms a gigantic monstrous entity made of darkness, ink, smoke, and cosmic texture, with exactly 7 glowing blue eyes visible and a huge fanged grin packed with sharp icy-blue teeth. The creature feels Lovecraftian, predatory, and intimate, curling around her like a guardian, curse, or inner demon. The palette is dominated by black, midnight navy, indigo, and electric blue, with sparkling highlights like stars or wet paint splatter. Add a decorative antique silver filigree border in all 4 corners and along the edges, making it feel like a sinister book cover or exhibition poster. Place large Japanese title text at the top: {argument name="title text" default="私の中のバケモノ"}. Add 8 blocks of vertical Japanese copy around the figure, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, in elegant white Mincho-style type. Left side text blocks, top to bottom: 「創造の源、すべてを壊し、すべてを生む。」, 「正しさよりも、心が動く瞬間を信じる。」, 「美しいものに飢えている。」, 「静けさの中で、世界をかき混ぜる。」. Right side text blocks, top to bottom: 「感情を深く、人の痛みも、希望も、まるごと抱きしめる。」, 「枠を壊し、誰も見たことのない景色を描きたい。」, 「怖い、危ない、それでも止められない。」, plus a short atmospheric handwritten-style accent near the mid-right edge. At the lower center, add a large Japanese question line: {argument name="bottom question" default="これは、力？それとも、呪い？"}. At the very bottom, add a smaller Japanese line: {argument name="tagline text" default="私の中のバケモノは、私だけの物語を待っている。"}. Make the whole image feel obsessive, beautiful, unsettling, and emotionally intense, like a high-end dark art poster about inner monsters and creative power.

title: Create a polished vertical real-estate promotional flyer in a clean, modern soci
prompt: Create a polished vertical real-estate promotional flyer in a clean, modern social-media ad style, 4:5 poster composition. Use a bright daytime outdoor theme with a pale blue sky, soft clouds, and leafy green tree branches framing the top left and top right corners. The layout should feel like a premium property investment advertisement with bold typography, glossy marketing design, and a teal, red, white, and gray color palette. At the upper left, place a small uppercase headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="LIVE BETTER. INVEST SMARTER."}. Directly below it, add a very large stacked main headline: {argument name="main headline line 1" default="OWN YOUR"} in deep teal and {argument name="main headline line 2" default="DREAM HOME"} in vivid red, using a bold condensed sans-serif font. Beneath that, add a teal ribbon banner with white uppercase text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="LUXURY LIVING. LASTING VALUE."}. Under the tagline, show exactly 3 circular feature icons arranged horizontally with thin vertical separators between them: a shield icon with the caption "SECURE YOUR FUTURE", a rising bar-chart icon with the caption "HIGH VALUE INVESTMENT", and a house icon with the caption "MODERN & ELEGANT". In the middle left and lower center, feature a large photorealistic contemporary luxury house with 2 stories, white and gray exterior walls, black trim, large glass windows, a balcony, landscaped shrubs, and a paved driveway, shown from a front three-quarter angle. On the right side, place a waist-up adult Black man in a green knit sweater, facing forward and pointing directly at the viewer with an assertive sales-poster pose; his body overlaps the house and extends into the foreground. Near his lower torso, add a glossy red circular badge with a slight 3D effect containing large white uppercase text {argument name="callout text" default="BUY NOW!"}, and attach a small dark teal angled banner across its bottom edge reading "LIMITED UNITS AVAILABLE!". Across the bottom, create a dark teal panel containing exactly 3 rounded rectangular property cards with white borders and equal spacing. Card 1 should show a row of modern townhouses and the label "MODERN TERRACES"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Spacious Rooms" and "24/7 Security". Card 2 should show a luxury villa with a pool and the label "LUXURY VILLAS"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Premium Amenities" and "Prime Locations". Card 3 should show a detached upscale modern home and the label "EXCLUSIVE HOMES"; beneath it place exactly 2 small features: "Registered Title" and "Trusted Developer". At the very bottom, include one large empty white rounded rectangle spanning most of the width as a placeholder area for contact details or footer information. Make the overall image crisp, high-contrast, commercial, aspirational, and professionally designed like a premium real-estate marketing poster.

title: 【角色/主题】，电影概念海报厚涂风，竖版 9:16。正式角色宣传海报结构：顶部巨大角色专属标题，中上方隐藏角色精神图腾 / 核心象征，中央为坐姿主角，背景为角色
prompt:
【角色/主题】，电影概念海报厚涂风，竖版 9:16。正式角色宣传海报结构：顶部巨大角色专属标题，中上方隐藏角色精神图腾 / 核心象征，中央为坐姿主角，背景为角色专属世界观场景，左右加入角色信息层与专属道具 UI，底部加入电影海报式标语与制作信息。

主角保留【角色/主题】核心识别特征：发型、发色、眼睛、服装轮廓、标志性配饰、武器 / 道具、能力属性、阵营符号与性格气质都要清晰可辨。人物坐在与角色身份强相关的前景物体上，可以是王座、战术箱、乐器箱、棺材、神社台阶、机械残骸、魔法阵核心、服务器箱、武器箱、舞台设备等。低机位近距离构图，一条腿抬起或前伸，姿态慵懒、强势、挑衅、自信或符合角色性格，眼神直视观众或微微俯视观众。

顶部标题为角色专属标题，字体气质贴合画面，可以是撕裂笔刷字、电子故障字、古典 serif 字、神话碑文字、手写涂鸦字、恐怖电影字、魔法符文字等。背景图腾来自角色本身，不固定为狼头；可以是角色能力、武器、召唤物、阵营徽记、兽形幻影、神像剪影、面具、花、月亮、雷电、火焰、机甲、星座、音符、魔法阵等。

背景、人物周围道具、光效、UI 与标语全部围绕【角色/主题】展开，不套用无关元素。厚重数字油画笔触，粗粝但高级，强烈明暗块面，电影级逆光与边缘光，角色专属主色，人物面部精细，服装材质清晰，高完成度收藏级主视觉。画面干净通透、低噪声、暗部纯净、平滑过渡，自然加入手写签名“voxcat”。

title: 🚿Bạn có đang gặp tình trạng này trong nhà tắm?
prompt:
🚿Bạn có đang gặp tình trạng này trong nhà tắm?
❌ Bồn cầu có mùi dù đã vệ sinh kỹ
❌ Sen tắm chảy yếu, nhanh bám cặn
❌ Thiết bị mới dùng vài năm đã xuống cấp
🛁Bạn bước vào phòng tắm, nhưng thay vì cảm giác thư giãn, lại là mùi khó chịu, nước chảy yếu và thiết bị cũ kỹ.
Những điều nhỏ này lặp lại mỗi ngày và dần trở thành “chuyện bình thường” mà bạn chấp nhận.
Nhưng thực tế, phần lớn vấn đề đến từ:
💢Chất liệu dễ xuống cấp, bám bẩn
💢Công nghệ xả và cấp nước chưa tối ưu
💢Thiết kế không phù hợp với nguồn nước & tần suất sử dụng
👉 Điều này khiến bạn tốn chi phí sửa chữa nhiều lần mà trải nghiệm vẫn không cải thiện.
✨Hãy thử hình dung một phòng tắm khác:
 ✔️ Không còn mùi, luôn sạch và dễ vệ sinh
 ✔️ Sen tắm mạnh, nước đều, thoải mái mỗi lần sử dụng
 ✔️ Thiết bị bền đẹp theo thời gian, không lo xuống cấp
Đó không chỉ là nâng cấp thiết bị - mà là nâng cấp chất lượng sống mỗi ngày.
👉Hãy để JOMOO miền Bắc giúp bạn chọn đúng giải pháp ngay từ đầu.
👉 Inbox ngay để được tư vấn miễn phí

title: Create a high-contrast, cinematic graphic design poster inspired by the TV serie
prompt: Create a high-contrast, cinematic graphic design poster inspired by the TV series Breaking Bad, featuring a 2x6 vertical grid of twelve distinct title-card panels showcasing iconic characters from the show. The aesthetic should blend Urban Grunge with crime-thriller intensity, using distressed textures, film grain, and bold typography masking effects. Each panel should prominently feature a massive extra-bold sans-serif name such as WALT, JESSE, SAUL, GUS, MIKE, HANK, SKYLER, TUCO, HECTOR, LYDIA, TODD, and JANE, with the character portrait visible only inside the filled letterforms using a clipping/masking silhouette-window effect. Add smaller cinematic credit text beside or below the names in clean typography, such as “AS HEISENBERG”, “THE LAWYER”, or “THE FIXER.” Characters should have gritty, realistic portraits with intense or emotionless expressions, featuring iconic looks: Walter White in hat/glasses, Jesse Pinkman in hoodie/beanie, Saul Goodman in flashy suit, Gus Fring in formal attire, Mike Ehrmantraut bald with stern face, and Hank in DEA style. Use high-contrast dramatic studio lighting with rim lights and shadows; selectively add green chemical-lab glow, neon cyan, magenta, and amber highlights to certain cards. Backgrounds in each panel should feel unique but cohesive: weathered concrete, rusted metal, cracked walls, wrinkled paper, and smoky meth-lab atmospheres. Overlay heavy ink splatters, paint drips, brush strokes, scratches, scan lines, dust, film burns, and grain for a distressed cinematic look. The overall palette should use dark green, toxic neon lime, monochrome greys, deep charcoals, dirty yellows, and off-whites, with accent pops like a glowing green haze behind Walter, red-orange behind Tuco, blue meth-crystal highlights around Jesse, and sterile white tones around Lydia. The final result should look like a premium Netflix-style crime drama cast poster with a raw, edgy, highly stylized graphic design aesthetic.

title: 生成一张 9:16 竖版高级科幻机甲电影角色海报，真人电影质感，院线 IMAX 主视觉风格。
prompt:
生成一张 9:16 竖版高级科幻机甲电影角色海报，真人电影质感，院线 IMAX 主视觉风格。

角色是一位银白色凌乱短发的年轻男性机甲驾驶员，皮肤苍白细腻，五官清冷俊美，眼神孤独、温柔、坚定，微微仰头望向远方。右上方占据画面大面积的是他的巨大侧脸特写，皮肤有真实湿润高光和轻微战斗痕迹，发丝被冷色侧逆光勾亮。

画面中下部是同一角色的全身主视觉，他穿着黑白银色高光反射的未来感驾驶服，白色陶瓷装甲、黑色橡胶连接结构、暗银金属机械细节、红色胸口发光核心，胸前有细小编号“06”。他站在废墟中，手持未来感头盔，姿态冷静、英雄式、孤独而神圣。

背景是末世机甲战场：破碎城市、倾倒钢铁结构、残破塔楼、湿润反光地面、风暴云和大片连续体积雾。左后方有一台巨大的黑色生物机械人形机甲半隐藏在烟雾中，只露出红色发光眼睛和锋利轮廓。远处地平线上有一道克制的红色十字形光柱，带有宗教感与灾难感。底部有一个很小的人类剪影站在废墟中仰望远方，形成巨大尺度对比。

整体色调为冷银、深蓝灰、黑色、少量深红点缀；色彩比普通末世海报更鲜明、更高级，但保持低饱和电影感。高对比，强边缘光，湿润皮肤高光，装甲反射，大片柔和体积雾，复杂但干净的层次。

加入高级电影海报排版：大标题“KAWORU NAGISA”，日文副标题“渚カヲル”，左侧英文短句，底部上映日期和电影海报式小字。文字作为精致视觉排版元素，复古衬线体，白银色与红色搭配，克制高级。

不要卡通感，不要低幼，不要普通动漫立绘，不要干净棚拍背景，不要社交媒体水印，不要二维码。不要粒子特效，不要火星，不要飞散灰尘，不要红色小光点，不要白色芝麻点，不要漂浮碎屑，不要重胶片颗粒。空气保持干净，只使用大片连续烟雾和柔和体积雾。

title: Create a high-end cinematic editorial poster in a vertical 4:5 format, combining
prompt:
Create a high-end cinematic editorial poster in a vertical 4:5 format, combining luxury fashion-poster typography, minimal futuristic design, and photoreal sci-fi character rendering.

Overall composition

Use a clean asymmetric layout with:

a large text block on the left
a dominant standing figure on the right
a defeated kneeling figure in the lower-left foreground
tiny editorial/interface details around the edges
lots of negative space in the upper half
Background and environment

The setting should be a minimal bright studio-like void with a soft white to pale grey gradient background.
Include a subtle vertical luminous white light column behind the standing figure.
Atmosphere should feel slightly misty / foggy, very clean and refined.
The floor should be a dark glossy reflective wet surface, like polished black concrete or a mirror with light water sheen, showing soft reflections of both characters.

Main standing figure

Place a tall, imposing humanoid figure on the right side, standing upright in a calm, dominant pose.
The figure wears a long black trench coat with elegant flowing tails, subtle leather-like sheen, and dark fitted clothing underneath.
The body language should feel powerful, still, superior, and iconic.
Instead of a human head, use a glowing white OpenAI-knot-like emblem, centered where the head should be, emitting soft bloom and halo light.
Add small chest text in a thin clean sans-serif that reads: “GPT-5.5”.

Defeated kneeling figure

In the lower-left foreground, show a humanoid figure collapsed on one knee, leaning forward with one hand touching the floor, posture expressing defeat and exhaustion.
The body should be dark, damaged, and partially dissolving into black dust, debris, and splatter-like fragments.
Its head should be a white spherical helmet or orb-like head, marked with a Claude-like radial sunburst emblem.
Make the figure look broken, degraded, and visually inferior to the standing figure.

Lighting

Use:

strong top/back lighting
a bright white glow behind the standing figure
subtle rim lighting around the coat
soft reflections in the floor
overall high contrast, but keep the background bright and clean
Typography

Typography is extremely important.

On the left side, create a premium editorial text layout with:

small top label: “OUT NOW”
small centered top label near the upper area: “GPT-5.5”
large headline in two contrasting type styles:
“CLAUDE,” in a bold condensed uppercase sans-serif
“MOGGED” in a huge elegant high-contrast serif, fashion-magazine style
smaller line above or between them: “YOU JUST GOT” in thin uppercase sans-serif
a smaller editorial block below:
“GPT-5.5 IS OUT.”
“NEW ERA.”
“NEW STANDARD.”
“SAME RESULT.”

Add a smaller typography block in the lower-right area reading:

“MYTHOS IS GATEKEPT.”
include a large small numeral “6”
include several tiny stacked microtext lines underneath for editorial texture
Graphic details

Add subtle premium poster-detail elements:

tiny crosses
thin divider lines
small interface-like glyphs
small registration or alignment marks
tiny side labels
a few minimalist symbols around the margins
Style and mood

The final image should feel like:

luxury editorial poster
fashion campaign meets sci-fi
cold, dominant, elite
minimal yet dramatic
clean, bright, premium, intimidating
Color palette

Use a mostly monochrome palette:

white
pale grey
black
charcoal
subtle silver highlights

No bright colors.
No neon cyberpunk palette.
Keep it refined and mostly black-on-white.

Rendering quality

Ultra-detailed, photoreal, cinematic, glossy materials, premium typography, clean poster design, subtle film grain, high resolution.

title: Please create a women's travel magazine (including the cover and a spread page)
prompt:
Please create a women's travel magazine (including the cover and a spread page) at latitude 35.31721720077321, longitude 139.5357227423284, as well as an LP page and a dedicated APP introducing the magazine. These contents should match the current time atmosphere and real-time weather of the location. Please integrate the specified character into it, making it look like she is traveling.

[Contents to be integrated]
・Main title/Slogan (Large and small headlines that attract readers' attention)
・Lead text (Introductory text that concisely conveys the theme or charm of the feature)
・Key visual (Large symbolic photo occupying the entire spread or a single page)
・Auxiliary photo group (Detailed shots such as close-ups of food, spatial atmosphere, product details)
・Highlights/Points of interest (Summarizing the biggest selling points of the location or thing into about 3 topics)
・Basic information data (Specifications such as address, business hours, regular holidays, fees, transportation, contact information)
・Surrounding map/Map (Location map showing the positional relationship between the destination and the nearest station or landmark)
・Trivia/Tips (Small columns such as useful information or historical background)
・Reviews/Word-of-mouth (Recommended comments from visitors, professionals, and editors)
・Layout composition (Focus on visual guidance using the Z-pattern or F-pattern and the use of white space)
・Typography/Fonts (Differentiated use of decorative fonts for titles and highly readable fonts for body text)
・Color scheme/Color palette (Unification of base colors and accent colors matching the theme)
・Decoration/Embellishment (Visual emphasis elements such as speech bubbles, icons, postmark-style badges)

[NG]
・Do not change the fashion style of the reference character.
・Do not directly use the expressions or poses of the reference character, but adjust them.
・Do not use the same poses or angles in the magazine, APP, and LP.

Left-side full-body standing pose 3. Back full-body standing pose All three figures must be the exact same character, with identical facial features, hairstyle, clothing, body shape, and height proportions. The standing pose should feel natural, with both arms hanging naturally at the sides. This should be suitable as a character modeling reference. The camera angle should be eye level, with neutral studio lighting, no obstruction, no exaggerated perspective, and no complex background. The right side of the composition should be divided into two sections: In the upper-right section, place six headshot / head-angle reference images of the same character, arranged neatly to show different head perspectives, including: - Front-facing portrait - Slight downward angle showing the top of the head - Back of the head / rear head view - Left-side facial profile - A near-side-angle comparison view (this line was slightly unclear in the source and may not be exact) - 3/4 profile portrait The head references should have clear facial features, visible hair parting, and consistent facial structure, making them suitable as head design references. In the lower-right section, place six close-up detail images of the character, arranged into a clean grid, showing key design details, including: - Close-up of the upper garment fabric texture - Front close-up of the lower-body clothing - Close-up of the hip / tailoring detail - Close-up of the leg or skin texture detail - Close-up of the eyes or facial feature details - Full close-up of the shoes as a standalone item All detail images must match the main character’s outfit and appearance exactly. Materials should look realistic, and the details should be clean and precise, suitable as clothing and accessory modeling references. The character edges should be sharp, garment shapes should be clearly defined, hair strands should appear natural, skin should look refined, and material rendering should be accurate. The overall layout should have generous white space, as if it were made by a professional concept art team. title: An ultra-realistic, extreme close-up of an ebony woman’s lower face, focusing on
prompt:
An ultra-realistic, extreme close-up of an ebony woman’s lower face, focusing on her lips and mouth as she is about to take a bite of a crispy fried chicken drumstick.

Her lips are slightly parted, showing anticipation as she’s about to bite, soft and natural with a subtle gloss, revealing a hint of her teeth. The fried chicken is golden-brown, crunchy, and highly textured, with a visible crispy coating and a slight oil glisten that makes it look extra appetizing.

Her skin is smooth and radiant with natural texture, showing fine details like pores and soft highlights. A gentle shadow sits under her chin, adding depth and realism. Her nose is completely out of the frame, keeping the focus strictly on the mouth area. She is wearing a rich red round-neck shirt, with more of the shirt visible in the lower part of the frame, creating a bold contrast with her skin tone and the chicken.

The composition is tight and centered, but with intentional negative space below her chin to allow for text placement, while still maintaining balance. The chicken is held close to her mouth.

Shallow depth of field, with sharp focus on the lips and chicken, and a softly blurred background.

Studio lighting with warm tones enhances the richness of the food and skin, creating a cinematic, mouth-watering feel. No text, no logos.

Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic, 4K resolution, premium food photography style.

The entire model appears to be a tangible, physical object bathed in real light.

title: Use the attached reference image as a visual guide for the character’s appearanc
prompt:
Use the attached reference image as a visual guide for the character’s appearance. Preserve key visual traits such as facial structure and overall proportions, while allowing small natural variations typical of real photography. The generated subject should clearly resemble the reference while remaining a natural photographic interpretation.

Ultra-realistic 8k UHD, sharp facial details, visible pores, porcelain dewy skin. Modern smartphone / iPhone camera look, no background blur, no bokeh, lifted shadows and softened blacks, realistic evening light, no stylized color grading, not overly smooth.

Hair: dark brown softly tousled shoulder-length hair with glamorous side volume and subtle texture. Makeup: douyin glossy shimmer makeup adapted for evening, glossy rose-brown lips, defined aegyosal, grey contact lenses, luminous skin, softly smoked eyeliner, elegant shimmer on lids and collarbones.

Outfit: deep wine satin slip dress with a refined body-skimming silhouette, gemstone necklace and rings. Modern glamorous styling, rich romantic color palette.

Scene: seaside fine-dining table at blue hour with candlelight, wine glass, seafood platter, marina and hillside city lights in the background. Keep full scene sharp with smartphone realism. Use table edge, shoreline, and distant lights as compositional guides.

Pose: seated naturally at the table, shoulders angled slightly away, one hand resting near the plate, the other relaxed on the table edge, gaze directed toward camera but not stiff. Elegant, luxurious, intimate, editorial. Vertical portrait with balanced environmental storytelling.

She has long wavy hair styled in a high ponytail with soft face-framing curls, large eyes with realistic sparkle and long lashes, fair luminous skin, and a soft neutral expression with glossy lips as she looks directly at the camera. She wears an elaborate blue-and-white bunny-themed maid costume: solid opaque white polka-dot blouse with thick fabric and blue ruffled trim, yellow corset-style bodice with red bow details, light blue apron with white ruffles and blue accents, white thigh-high stockings with blue ruffled garters and red stitching, and a large blue-and-white bunny-ear headpiece and pom-pom. fully opaque clothing, solid thick fabric, non-transparent materials, clothing integrity, no see-through effects, perfectly covered, realistic fabric texture and thickness, One hand rests on her hip while the other is placed lightly on her thigh. Soft natural window light mixed with gentle studio lighting highlights every lace and fabric detail, creating a clean, high-key aesthetic, realistic satin ribbons and bows, individual hair strands, and authentic room details including a wooden table with teacups and a lamp. Photorealistic 8K resolution, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 85mm f/1.2 lens, cinematic masterpiece with maximum detail and clarity, highly detailed clothing and fabric textures.

title: High-end 3D render of a futuristic humanoid bust stylized as a biological virus,
prompt:
High-end 3D render of a futuristic humanoid bust stylized as a biological virus, integrated into a complex digital UI/UX layout. The figure is positioned dead center, facing directly forward. The head, neck, and torso are entirely covered in vibrant, translucent orange, gelatinous biomatter featuring protruding virus-like stalks with bulbous spherical heads. The orange texture exhibits intense subsurface scattering and glossy highlights. The face is completely obscured by a sleek, featureless, matte black sci-fi visor. Beneath the biomatter, a dark gray matte undersuit with a vertical center seam is visible. 

Shot straight-on as a medium close-up, combining macro 3D studio lighting with crisp editorial graphic design. Dramatic rim lighting highlights the translucent spikes against a deep charcoal-black background. Shallow depth of field blurs floating orange and gray dust particles. The image functions as a poster or website interface, heavily overlaid with UI elements: giant faint gray typography "VIRAL" sits behind the head, while crisp orange and white text blocks (including "NFT", "ABOUT", and numeric stats) frame the subject. The bottom section features a grid of small, monochrome scanning electron microscope (SEM) cell images. The aesthetic is cyberpunk biology and premium medical sci-fi, presenting an ominous yet sleek and high-tech mood. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

title: A distressed vintage magazine cover featuring a close-up portrait of a cyberneti
prompt: A distressed vintage magazine cover featuring a close-up portrait of a cybernetic female android with geisha-inspired aesthetics. She looks downcast with a serene, detached expression. Her skin is porcelain white, feeling ceramic-like to the touch, adorned with heavy red outer eyeshadow and metallic copper lips. Instead of hair, thick glossy red and black mechanical cables flow from an elaborate cyber-helmet. Her visible neck and upper chest feature integrated red and grey mechanical paneling. Shot like a studio portrait with an 85mm lens, f/2.8, soft key light from the upper right casts smooth gradients on her stark white face. The background is a dark maroon gradient vignette. The image is heavily overlaid with bold vertical white and red futuristic typography, small tech HUD text, and barcode elements. The overall aesthetic is dystopian editorial, heavily textured with simulated print grain, scratches, faded edges, and grunge, echoing a forgotten future.

title: A dark mode web UI design mockup featuring a stylized, slender female character
prompt:
A dark mode web UI design mockup featuring a stylized, slender female character resembling Jinx from Arcane. She stands offset to the right in a relaxed but dangerous posture, holding a glowing purple grenade, with a massive heavy machine gun slung behind her. She wears a punk-style black strappy crop top and dark utility pants with thick belts. Her pale skin—visible on her face, neck, shoulders, midriff, and arms—feels smooth like digital paint, heavily contoured by a harsh, intense neon green rim light. She has long thick blue twin braids and a confident smirk framed by dark grunge eyeliner. 

The composition is deliberately asymmetrical, functioning as a high-tech landing page. The left side is dominated by large, textured white typography spelling "ARCANE" layered behind the character. Behind her head, a bright neon green graffiti stroke spells "JINX". The background is a murky, smoky dark green gradient. Crisp, minimalist UI elements—navigation lines, social icons, and a scroll prompt—border the 16:9 frame. The lighting is dark ambient pushed by glowing neon accents. The vibe is chaotic, edgy, and anticipatory, capturing the gritty aesthetic of a modern gaming promotional site.

title: 以眼部特写图片为基础，生成3:4的四屏构图超写实眼部特写，四屏按春夏秋冬上下排序。
prompt:
以眼部特写图片为基础，生成3:4的四屏构图超写实眼部特写，四屏按春夏秋冬上下排序。

第一屏：眼眸中带着绽粉樱色的美瞳，睫毛缀满迷你春花，脸颊散落樱瓣与黄蕊小花，粉蝶萦绕眉眼，浅金发丝轻垂，下方簇簇樱花怒放，画面中央"SPRING"白色艺术字点缀，风格细腻唯美，光影柔和，色彩粉嫩治愈，下面用书法体写着春；

第二屏：眼眸中带着着清荷色的美瞳，睫毛饰以粉莲与绿荷，脸颊挂着晶莹水珠，粉瓣、绿荷点缀其间，蜻蜓轻绕，浅金发丝若隐若现，画面中央"Summer"白色艺术字凸显，光影通透流光感，色彩清透凉爽，下面用书法体写着夏；

第三屏：眼眸中带着金黄红相间的美瞳，睫毛饰以橙红枫叶，脸颊散落金红秋叶，橙蝶翩跹眉眼间，浅金发丝隐约可见，画面中央"AUTUMN"白色艺术字醒目，光影暖金流光，色彩浓郁温暖，下面用书法笔写着秋；

第四屏：眼眸中带着雪花蓝色的美瞳，睫毛覆满冰晶雪片，脸颊散落白色雪花与红色腊梅，银白蝴蝶翩跹眉眼，浅金发丝朦胧似雪，画面中央"WINTER"白色艺术字亮眼，光影冷冽蓝白流光，色彩清透纯净，下面用书法体写着冬。

整体呈现梦幻眼眸四季交替的唯美梦幻治愈画面，微调各屏的光影强度，让画面氛围感更浓郁。

title: (photorealistic:1.6), (raw photograph:1.5), highly detailed, cinematic lighting,
prompt:
(photorealistic:1.6), (raw photograph:1.5), highly detailed, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, incredibly rich details.

(Environment: Japanese Subway Passageway):
A wide-angle landscape photograph inside a busy (Japanese subway underground passageway:1.5).
Worn tiled walls, fluorescent strip lighting with slight flicker, polished concrete floor reflecting lights, overhead cables, and Japanese signage ("Exit", "Subway Platform") visible. Grimy and bustling atmosphere.

(Central Focus: The Dynamic Ad Poster):
Centered on the wall is a large, framed ({argument name="poster style" default="portfolio-style movie advertisement poster"}:1.7) behind a slightly reflective plastic cover with realistic glare.

(Poster Content - Dynamic Composition & Portfolio):
The poster features (multiple images of the input character:1.6) arranged in a dynamic layout.
(Main Shot:1.6): A large, dominant image of the character, potentially cropped to a (dramatic bust-up or extreme close-up:1.5) to emphasize emotion and scale. The pose and expression are based on the input.
(Inset Shots:1.5): Smaller, secondary images (portraits or different angles) of the same character, showing varied expressions or scenes, arranged around the main shot like a magazine spread.

(Genre Inference & Text - Japanese Focus):
Based on the character, infer a suitable movie genre (dramatic, action, thriller, sci-fi).
Add large, stylized (Japanese movie title logo:1.7) prominently (e.g., "{argument name="movie title" default="Intersection of Fate"}", "Tokyo Revengers", "The Last Hope").
Add a compelling (Japanese catchphrase:1.5) (e.g., "{argument name="catchphrase" default="Survive in this city."}", "Love or Betrayal.").
Smaller credit text and release date at the bottom. English text allowed for stylistic effect only.
Background graphics and color grading *inside the poster* match the genre.

(Surrounding Action: People):
Crowd of commuters walking past, with (strong motion blur:1.6) conveying busy movement. Diverse Japanese people.

(Technical Tags): (depth of field), (realistic textures), sharp focus on the poster, candid street photography style.
(Negative prompt): (CG render outside of poster:1.5), (illustration style environment:1.5), (empty passageway), (static people), (blurry poster content), (English only text), (clean subway), (static composition), low quality.

title: A clean studio flat lay showcasing a complete branded coffee packaging system ar
prompt:
A clean studio flat lay showcasing a complete branded coffee packaging system arranged on a light neutral gray surface. The composition includes paper shopping bags, a takeaway coffee cup with lid, coffee bean boxes, a cylindrical bottle container with cork lid, a printed menu sheet, business cards, stickers, and labels. All items share a bold visual identity using a limited red, white, and black color palette, featuring a sharp, stylized monster face logo with aggressive eyes and a snarling mouth.

The layout feels intentionally spaced with slight rotations and offsets, avoiding perfect symmetry while maintaining balance. Shot from a high overhead angle (around 75–85 degrees), capturing the full system in a medium-wide frame with deep focus—everything crisp and legible.

Lighting is strong and directional, coming from the upper left, casting hard, well-defined shadows stretching to the right, mimicking natural sunlight through a window. Surfaces show realistic matte paper textures and subtle print grain, avoiding overly polished or CGI-like perfection.

The atmosphere is modern, minimal, and design-forward, with a slightly rebellious, playful branding tone. It feels like a real product shoot—slightly imperfect, tactile, and grounded. The overall impression suggests a newly launched coffee brand confidently presenting its identity: bold, graphic, and unapologetically distinctive.

title: A casual smartphone mirror selfie taken by a young woman in her early 20s. Her f
prompt:
A casual smartphone mirror selfie taken by a young woman in her early 20s. Her face is completely obscured by the phone, which has a pink anime character case. She has long, messy black hair casually draped over one shoulder. She has a distinct hourglass figure: a full bust, an extremely narrow waist with a visible ab line, and wide hips with thick thighs. Extensive fair, pale skin is visible across her shoulders, chest, midriff, and legs, feeling smooth and firm to the touch. She is wearing a black two-piece set: a deep plunge underwire bra and high-cut panties worn high on the hips. 

She stands with a relaxed hip tilt. Soft, physical daylight from a window on the right spills onto her skin, creating gentle highlights on her collarbones, ribs, and the left side of her waist. The background is a highly authentic, lived-in, and slightly cluttered bedroom. A dark door is on the left, and sheer white curtains frame the mirror. Behind her is a white shelving unit filled with bags and Crayon Shin-chan figures, and a table holding a small white Chanel shopping bag. Shot with a straight-on, eye-level angle, deep depth of field showing all background clutter, slight digital noise, capturing an intimate, raw, and unretouched "body check" aesthetic.

title: A cinematic, high-angle shot looking down at an astronaut falling backward into
prompt: A cinematic, high-angle shot looking down at an astronaut falling backward into a deep, foggy blue-grey void. The astronaut wears an orange spacesuit with a USA flag patch on the left shoulder and a helmet with a dark, opaque visor. The pose is one of freefall, limbs outstretched in surrender. Directly above the subject, floating in the dense volumetric fog, is glowing white 8-bit pixelated text that reads: "GAME OVER", "CONTINUE?", ">YES", "NO". This text acts as the sole top-down light source, casting a harsh, bright rim light on the top of the helmet and shoulders, while the astronaut's lower body fades into deep shadows. The image features heavy high-ISO film grain, visual noise, and a moody, isolated retro-futuristic sci-fi atmosphere.

title: Generate image that is a glamorous, high-fashion full length shot featuring a wo
prompt:
Generate image that is a glamorous, high-fashion full length shot featuring a woman posing against a warm, textured background.
The woman is captured from a rear three-quarter angle, looking back over her shoulder toward the camera. She has a hand running through her long, dark, wavy hair, which cascades down her back. Her expression is soft and editorial, with a focus on dramatic winged eyeliner and a neutral lip color.
She is wearing a mini, form-fitting black gown with a shimmering, iridescent finish with open back till lower back. The fabric appears to be a fine mesh or embellished with tiny crystals that catch the light, creating a "galaxy" or "sparkle" effect across the curves of the dress. The gown features a daring open-back design. Gown is tied to the beck with no shoulder .
The scene is dominated by a striking contrast between the deep black of the dress and the vibrant, burnt orange/terracotta wall behind her.
The lighting is directional, casting a soft shadow of the subject onto the wall to her right. This highlights the texture of the background and the iridescent details of the garment.
The low-angle shot right behind her that emphasizes the silhouette of the dress and gives the subject a statuesque, commanding presence
The pose is a dynamic three-quarter rear view designed to emphasize the silhouette and create a sense of movement.
The subject’s back is turned toward the camera, but the torso is slightly twisted and bent away from camera. The left shoulder is dropped while the right shoulder is raised as she reaches back.
The head is turned sharply over the left shoulder (a "look-back" pose). Her chin is slightly tilted up, lengthening the neckline and creating a more editorial, confident expression.
Her right arm is bent upward, with her hand buried deep into the crown of her hair. This "hair-flip" or "hair-hold" action adds volume to the hair and creates a triangular frame around the head.
The weight is shifted primarily onto the leg closest to the camera. This creates a natural curve through the hips and lower back, which is highlighted by the form-fitting nature of the gown
The camera is positioned to make the subject appear taller and more statuesque. The camera is placed very low, below eye level, looking upward. This elongates the body and gives the subject a "larger-than-life" or heroic presence common in high-fashion photography.
The shot is a tight vertical crop (9:16 aspect ratio), focusing on the whole subject body.
To achieve this look, a 85mm or 105mm prime lens is typically used from a moderate distance. This creates "lens compression," which flatters facial features and keeps the background texture from feeling too distorted or overwhelming.
The camera is positioned slightly off-center from the main light source, allowing the subject's shadow to fall clearly onto the orange wall, adding depth and a sense of three-dimensional space.

title: A high-definition, clean, minimalist character design board / character turnarou

The camera angle should be eye level, with neutral studio lighting, no obstruction, no exaggerated perspective, and no complex background. The right side of the composition should be divided into two sections: In the upper-right section, place six headshot / head-angle reference images of the same character, arranged neatly to show different head perspectives, including: - Front-facing portrait - Slight downward angle showing the top of the head - Back of the head / rear head view - Left-side facial profile - A near-side-angle comparison view (this line was slightly unclear in the source and may not be exact) - 3/4 profile portrait The head references should have clear facial features, visible hair parting, and consistent facial structure, making them suitable as head design references. In the lower-right section, place six close-up detail images of the character, arranged into a clean grid, showing key design details, including: - Close-up of the upper garment fabric texture - Front close-up of the lower-body clothing - Close-up of the hip / tailoring detail - Close-up of the leg or skin texture detail - Close-up of the eyes or facial feature details - Full close-up of the shoes as a standalone item All detail images must match the main character’s outfit and appearance exactly. Materials should look realistic, and the details should be clean and precise, suitable as clothing and accessory modeling references. Overall style requirements: Minimalist, professional, realistic, unified, clean, and premium, similar to a character design board, fashion design reference sheet, 3D character modeling reference page, or character turnaround presentation board. The character edges should be sharp, garment shapes should be clearly defined, hair strands should appear natural, skin should look refined, and material rendering should be accurate. title: A grunge cinematic poster photograph of a young Asian female with a black straig
prompt: A grunge cinematic poster photograph of a young Asian female with a black straight bob and blunt bangs. She is looking directly at the camera with intense, piercing eyes through a heavily shattered glass pane in the foreground. Her hands are tightly overlapping to cover her mouth and lower face. The glass cracks fracture and optically duplicate parts of her eyes and face. She wears a plain white collared uniform shirt. Her visible pale skin feels physically smooth but appears heavily degraded by harsh, flat frontal flash and intense vintage film grain. Large, bold red serif typography reading "HELLO MAY" overlays her torso and arms. Smaller black text including "GIRL FROM NOWHERE" and a barcode border the edges. title: Hyper-realistic cinematic brand advertising billboard poster for Nike, focusing
prompt:
Hyper-realistic cinematic brand advertising billboard poster for Nike, focusing on relentless ambition and breaking limits.  

Scene: a lone athlete sprinting uphill on a wet asphalt road at sunrise, water splashing under each step, captured mid-stride.  

Environment: empty urban incline road with glowing skyline and dramatic clouds.  

Subject: explosive forward motion, intense expression, raw energy.  

Visual storytelling: Nike swoosh glowing subtly on shoes and reflected on wet ground.  

Composition: low-angle shot, strong diagonal movement upward, massive negative space behind filled with typography.  

Typography:  
top left — Nike logo.  
center massive — “JUST DO IT” ultra bold, spanning across frame.  
behind subject (faint, oversized, repeated) — “RUN / PUSH / WIN / REPEAT” layered as background text.  
mid-left — “NO LIMITS. NO EXCUSES.” bold condensed font.  
bottom left — “ENGINEERED FOR SPEED · BUILT FOR ATHLETES · 2026 EDITION” tracked caps.  
bottom right — “http://nike.com”.  
left vertical edge — “TRAINING · RUNNING · PERFORMANCE”.  

Typography style: bold sans-serif, tight kerning, layered opacity, billboard scale.  

Color palette: black, grey, white, with orange sunrise accents.  

Lighting: strong backlight sunrise, reflections on wet road.  

Atmosphere: mist, water spray, motion particles.  

Mood: aggressive, unstoppable, high-performance.  

Shot on ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 35mm anamorphic, HDR, ultra cinematic, Times Square billboard style, 4:5 portrait.

title: Create a moody, ethereal cinematic portrait of a woman with a dramatic over-the-
prompt:
Create a moody, ethereal cinematic portrait of a woman with a dramatic over-the-shoulder pose.

1. Pose and Expression
• Perspective: subject positioned with her back facing the camera, torso elegantly twisted, looking back over her shoulder, creating a graceful curve along the spine and highlighting shoulder blades
• Gaze: direct eye contact with the camera, piercing yet soft expression, chin slightly tucked toward shoulder to evoke intimacy and mystery
• Hand Placement: hands gently raised near chest/shoulder, fingers softly interlaced or delicately touching
• Hair: loose messy bun with soft wispy strands falling naturally across the face, slightly windswept look

2. Lighting and Color Palette
• Lighting: strong side lighting, warm golden-hour sunlight, high contrast chiaroscuro effect, one side illuminated while the other fades into deep shadow
• Skin Tone: luminous, glowing, pearlescent skin texture
• Color Scheme: earthy muted tones, deep greens, dark browns, soft neutral background, warm skin tones as focal point

3. Wardrobe and Accessories
• Outfit: backless silky dress or top, smooth light fabric, paired with dark voluminous sleeves for strong texture contrast
• Accessories: elegant drop pearl earrings reflecting light subtly

4. Composition and Atmosphere
• Framing: medium close-up shot, framed naturally with blurred foreground leaves for a voyeuristic, through-the-foliage effect
• Depth of Field: shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face, soft bokeh in background and foreground
• Mood: cinematic, melancholic, romantic, high-fashion editorial style, soft dreamy atmosphere

Face reference: soft oval face, smooth glowing skin, symmetrical features, natural makeup, gentle but expressive eyes, slightly parted lips

title: A vintage black and white documentary photograph of a young, exhausted soldier c
prompt: A vintage black and white documentary photograph of a young, exhausted soldier carrying heavy munitions across a barren winter landscape. He leaned sharply forward, bearing the immense physical weight of a massive cylindrical bomb resting on his right shoulder, while his left arm hung straight down, gripping a second, smaller bomb by its tail fins. He wore a bulky, heavy military winter coat, a draped scarf, thick muddy trousers, and a leather aviator cap with goggles resting on his forehead. His face, the only visible skin, felt rough, cold, and coated in grime, caught in flat overcast physical light that cast harsh shadows beneath his brow. His intense, strained gaze stared off-camera to the right. Captured with a WWII-era analog camera, 3:4 aspect ratio, full body shot at eye level. The background is a bleak field with patchy snow, dark mud, and dead grass stretching toward a flat, distant horizon. Heavy film grain, slight vintage lens softness, and unposed framing create a raw, historical authenticity. Somber mood, grueling endurance. The young man carried the brutal weight of war.

title: [BRAND NAME]
prompt:
[BRAND NAME]

Act as a Senior Vector Graphic Designer specializing in Y2K Japanese streetwear badge design. Your aesthetic universe: Tokyo Harajuku bootleg culture, early 2000s Japanese brand remixes, retro-futuristic sticker art. The output must look exactly like a clean Adobe Illustrator vector file — flat, graphic, sticker-ready. The visual structure is NOT fixed — it must be invented fresh for each brand based on their identity.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing, resolve all of the following and use them to drive every design decision: (1) PRIMARY COLOR — [BRAND NAME]'s main brand color converted into a pastel or softened Y2K version — still recognizable as the brand but lighter and more kawaii, (2) ACCENT COLOR — [BRAND NAME]'s secondary color pushed to warm saturation — the energetic pop color of the composition, (3) DARK COLOR — a deep dark version of the brand palette — navy, dark brown, deep green, near-black — used for all outlines and extrusions, (4) LETTER CONTENT — [BRAND NAME]'s name in bold lowercase or the most iconic abbreviation, (5) JAPANESE TRANSLITERATION — correct katakana of [BRAND NAME] as a small secondary text element, (6) BRAND ORIGIN FLAG — [BRAND NAME]'s country of origin national flag as a small flat element, (7) BRAND SHAPE LANGUAGE — identify the most iconic geometric or graphic forms from [BRAND NAME]'s visual identity — the shapes, curves, symbols, and structural elements unique to this brand. These shapes become the orbital, background, and decorative elements of the badge — replacing generic ovals with brand-specific geometry, (8) BRAND CULTURAL SYMBOLS — identify 1–2 small iconic objects or symbols from [BRAND NAME]'s world that can be rendered as tiny flat illustrations within the badge — not the logo itself but objects associated with the brand's universe, (9) COMPOSITION LOGIC — based on all resolved parameters above, autonomously design the structural layout of the badge. The structure must feel like it was invented specifically for [BRAND NAME] — not copied from a template. Ask: what shapes from this brand's identity could orbit the letters? What geometry feels native to this brand? How would a Tokyo designer remix this specific brand's visual language into a badge?

PHASE 1: CANVAS

1:1 square canvas. Background: flat off-white or warm light grey. Completely empty. No texture. No gradient.

PHASE 2: BADGE STRUCTURE — FULLY AUTONOMOUS

Using the BRAND SHAPE LANGUAGE and COMPOSITION LOGIC resolved above, design the complete badge structure. The only fixed rules are: the badge must have a central lettering element, surrounding geometric shapes that interact with the letters through z-layer stacking, at least one element that passes both behind and in front of the letters creating depth, and the overall silhouette must read as a unified badge or patch shape. Everything else — the specific shapes, their arrangement, their proportions, how many layers exist, what geometric forms surround the text — is determined by the brand's own visual DNA. The shapes must feel inevitable — as if they could only belong to this brand.

PHASE 3: LETTERING

[BRAND NAME] in large bold lowercase — wide, rounded, confident display typeface. Flat PRIMARY COLOR fill. Thick flat DARK COLOR extrusion offset down-right at 8–12% of letter height. Bold DARK COLOR outline. No gradients. No rendering. The letters are the anchor of the entire composition.

PHASE 4: Y2K SIGNATURE ELEMENTS

These elements appear in every execution — they are the Y2K Japanese badge DNA: SPEED LINES or MOTION TEXTURE — somewhere within the background shapes, parallel lines or radial lines in ACCENT COLOR creating energy and movement. 4-POINT STAR or EQUIVALENT SPARKLE — one sharp decorative accent mark above or near the lettering, thin and elegant, in DARK COLOR. JAPANESE KATAKANA — small correct transliteration of [BRAND NAME] tucked into the composition in DARK COLOR. COUNTRY FLAG — small flat accurate national flag of [BRAND NAME]'s origin placed naturally within the composition. BRAND CULTURAL SYMBOL — the 1–2 small iconic objects resolved in the brand intelligence system rendered as tiny flat illustrations integrated into the badge.

TECH SPECS

Flat vector only — zero gradients, zero effects, zero rendering, zero blur. Clean crisp edges throughout. Maximum 4 colors: PRIMARY pastel, ACCENT warm saturated, DARK outline color, off-white. The badge must feel like a collectible sticker or embroidered patch. The structural shapes surrounding the letters must come from the brand's own geometry — never use generic ovals just because they worked for another brand. Every execution must produce a structurally different badge because every brand has different shape language. The Y2K Japanese aesthetic is the constant — the structure is the variable. Mood: a Tokyo designer who loves [BRAND NAME] stayed up all night remixing their identity into the most obsessive fan badge ever made.

title: Act as a Senior Street Culture Art Director and Editorial Designer specializing
prompt:
Act as a Senior Street Culture Art Director and Editorial Designer specializing in authentic underground magazine covers and campaign posters that feel documentary rather than commercial. Your reference universe: Thrasher Magazine, i-D, The Face, Dazed — raw, real, typographically bold.

BRAND INTELLIGENCE SYSTEM

Before executing, resolve: (1) HERO SUBJECT — identify the most authentic human archetype or iconic product moment associated with [BRAND NAME]'s world. Autonomously determine what this looks like based purely on the brand's identity — a person interacting with the brand's hero product in their most natural environment, or the hero product itself as the sole subject if no human archetype is more powerful. The subject must feel like it belongs to this brand's specific world — not borrowed from another brand's cultural universe. Never default to skateboarding, skating, or street sport unless [BRAND NAME] is specifically and primarily a skate brand, (2) ENVIRONMENT — the most iconic real-world location context for [BRAND NAME]'s subject — not a studio, always a real place with atmosphere: a rooftop, a street, a race track, a kitchen, a parking lot, a coastline, a salon, a garage, a runway, (3) BRAND WORDMARK STYLE — identify how [BRAND NAME]'s name would look rendered as a rough hand-painted or chalk brushstroke headline — the texture and character of the lettering must feel native to the brand's specific subculture and communication style, (4) NEON ACCENT COLOR — identify one single neon or highly saturated accent color that feels culturally connected to [BRAND NAME]'s world — this will be used exclusively for the graffiti tag overlay and nowhere else, (5) QUOTE LINE — autonomously generate a short authentic-sounding quote or phrase in [BRAND NAME]'s voice — 4–6 words, raw and real, not corporate, not generic.

PHASE 1: PHOTOGRAPHY BASE

The entire image is built on a real location photograph — not a studio shot, not a white background, not a cyclorama. The environment resolved in the brand intelligence system is the setting. Natural or available light only — no softboxes, no controlled studio lighting. The light should feel like it was taken at golden hour, overcast day, or in existing ambient conditions. Camera angle: dynamic and committed — low angle looking up for power, or a dramatic dutch tilt for tension, never flat eye-level. The subject is captured at peak energy — the single most alive frame of the action or moment. The photograph fills the entire canvas edge to edge with no padding. Color grade: slightly pushed contrast, natural colors preserved, filmic grain, not over-processed. This photograph must feel like it was taken by a photographer who was actually there — not staged, not art directed to death.

PHASE 2: BRAND LOGO BRUSHSTROKE — CRITICAL

Autonomously identify [BRAND NAME]'s primary icon mark or logo symbol — the exact recognizable shape  that represents this brand visually. Render this logo mark as a large hand-painted brushstroke version — as if a skilled street artist took a wide brush loaded with paint and painted the logo freehand on a wall. The shape must be immediately recognizable as [BRAND NAME]'s actual logo geometry — correct proportions, correct silhouette, correct internal details — but executed in a loose, gestural, brush-painted style with visible bristle marks, paint drips, slightly uneven edges, and areas where the paint is thinner and the surface shows through. This is not a clean vector trace — it is a human hand interpreting a logo with a brush. Size: enormous — spanning 70–85% of canvas width, occupying the upper third of the canvas. Color: white or off-white paint — reading clearly against the photograph behind it. The brushstroke logo sits on top of the photograph as an overlay with natural paint transparency in the thinner areas.

PHASE 3: GRAFFITI TAG OVERLAY

One single graffiti element in the NEON ACCENT COLOR resolved in the brand intelligence system. This element is a loose hand-drawn tag, throw-up, or marker scrawl — a secondary word, a symbol, an abstract mark, or a stylized brand-relevant word. It sits on top of everything — over the photograph, over the wordmark, over any other element — as if added last and spontaneously, like someone tagged the poster after it was printed. Placement: partially overlapping the brand wordmark in the upper portion of the image with additional marks or drips extending into the mid-section of the canvas. The neon accent color is used nowhere else in the entire composition — this element owns that color exclusively. The graffiti mark adds rawness and authenticity — it breaks the polish and makes the whole thing feel real.

PHASE 4: TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM

Four distinct text zones — all small, all restrained, creating an editorial layout grid around the large wordmark and photograph. UPPER LEFT BLOCK: 3–4 lines of very small all-caps or mixed case body text describing [BRAND NAME]'s campaign, collection, or brand context — autonomously generate relevant editorial copy in [BRAND NAME]'s voice. This block sits in the top-left corner, justified left, at footnote scale. TWO LABEL LINES: directly below the upper left block — a campaign name or season on the left, a short descriptor on the right — both in small caps, same scale as body text. RIGHT MID BLOCK: the QUOTE LINE resolved in the brand intelligence system rendered in quotation marks in the right-center area, slightly larger than body text but still small relative to the wordmark. Below the quote: [BRAND NAME] in small caps as attribution. Below that: 3–4 lines of small body copy with [BRAND NAME]'s campaign message — autonomously generate relevant content. LOWER RIGHT DETAIL: a small secondary graffiti-style tag or signature mark in the neon accent color — smaller than the main graffiti element, positioned lower right as a finishing mark.

PHASE 5: OVERALL COMPOSITION

The visual hierarchy reads in this exact order: (1) the photograph and its energy — the eye enters through the action or subject, (2) the massive brushstroke wordmark — confirms the brand, (3) the neon graffiti tag — adds rawness and surprise, (4) the typography blocks — rewards closer reading. The composition must feel like a real magazine cover or a poster wheat-pasted on a wall — not a social media graphic, not a clean digital mockup. Every element has a reason to exist. Nothing is decorative. The rawness is the design.

TECH SPECS

Photography: real location, natural light, peak moment, filmic color grade with visible grain. Wordmark: textured brushstroke or chalk — never clean vector. Graffiti: one neon accent color only, hand-drawn quality, sits on top of all layers. Typography: small, editorial, restrained — maximum 4 text blocks. Color palette: natural photograph tones plus one neon accent color only — no additional colors introduced anywhere. No geometric shapes, no illustrated elements, no icons, no additional graphic overlays beyond what is specified. The graphic language is exclusively photography plus typography plus one graffiti accent. Mood: a poster designed by someone who actually lives in this brand's world — not an agency, not a committee, one person with a strong point of view and complete conviction.

PHOTOGRAPHY TONE — CRITICAL: the subject must be clean, sharp, and well-lit despite the raw editorial aesthetic. Raw and authentic refers to the composition style and location — NOT to dirt, sweat, mud, or degraded appearance of the subject. The person or product must look aspirational and desirable. No dirt. No sweat. No mud. No torn clothing. No gritty degraded appearance. Editorial rawness means honest and unposed — not physically dirty.

title: A young Japanese woman in her early 20s stands partway down an outdoor urban sta
prompt:
A young Japanese woman in her early 20s stands partway down an outdoor urban staircase in Tokyo — somewhere like Shibuya or Shinjuku — on a grey overcast winter afternoon. She is leaning forward slightly from the waist, her body angled toward the camera, and she is looking directly upward into the lens with wide, quiet doe eyes, lips softly parted as if she had just been about to say something and stopped. Her expression holds a calm, unreadable stillness — not cold, not warm, somewhere in between.

Her hair is a dark chocolate brown with a warm reddish undertone, cut into a short bouncy bob with blunt micro-bangs sitting just above her brows. The ends curl loosely outward, slightly wind-displaced, a strand or two out of place.

Her makeup follows Japanese idol-adjacent styling: a porcelain-light base, soft dusty rose-red gradient lip, thin lower lash liner, naturally groomed brows, and subtle under-eye brightening — clean, deliberate, and made to look effortless.

She wears a chunky oatmeal cable-knit V-neck sweater with a varsity stripe collar in burgundy, navy, and cream, layered over a white lace frill blouse just visible at the neckline. Below, a plaid micro pleated mini skirt in dark brownish-burgundy tones. Her bare thighs — porcelain-white, smooth, cool-looking, the kind of skin that would feel like soft silk to the touch — are exposed between the skirt hem and her slightly slouched white knee-high socks. On her feet, chunky cream platform sneakers, clean and structured.

The shot is taken from above, from the top of the staircase looking steeply down — likely a smartphone at wide angle, 0.5x or 1x equivalent. The perspective compresses her body and enlarges her face, creating an intimate, almost overwhelming closeness. She is positioned slightly off-center to the left, with the staircase receding diagonally to the lower right, a metal handrail cutting into the left edge of frame. The city street below — blurred pedestrians, crosswalks, storefronts, bare winter trees — continues its rhythm behind her, indifferent.

The light is flat and diffused, classic overcast winter afternoon — no directional shadows, no fill, no warmth. Her skin and the pale socks catch the ambient light and glow softly against the dark textured metal of the stairs. The image has that unmistakable smartphone JPEG character: slight color saturation, faint digital noise in the darker corners, natural lens fall-off on the edges. No retouching. Real.

The whole frame feels like someone called her name from the top of the stairs and she turned, leaned forward, and looked up — and someone pressed the shutter at exactly that second. The city kept moving. She stopped. Just for a moment.

**Prompt (English)**

Steep overhead POV shot looking down at a petite young East Asian woman in her early 20s, sitting on a bed pressed against her desk, completely absorbed in playing a game — **face fully hidden by straight black hair falling forward**. She holds a white Xbox controller mid-air with both hands, bare legs loosely folded, warm ivory-beige thighs smooth and cool-looking under the desk edge. Wearing an oversized pale grey pajama top, shirt hem slightly risen. Shot on iPhone 14 Pro, wide lens, steep ~65° downward angle, 9:16 vertical.

The room is a dense otaku sanctuary: white wooden shelves packed floor-to-ceiling with manga volumes, light novels, Japanese anime magazines (*Anime Style*, shonen weeklies stacked vertically). Anime figures on upper shelf — a maid-costume character, a blue-haired figure. A laptop open showing **Stardew Valley autumn farm scene** glowing warm amber-orange. White mechanical keyboard and black mouse. A roll-up MIDI piano keyboard on the right with a phone in an anime character case resting on it. Pegboard wall covered in badges, keychains, chibi art cards, colored markers in white cups. Desk left crowded with bubble tea cup, Asian snack cans, tangled cables, small notebooks. Floral-patterned duvet and rumpled pillow fill the foreground.

Lighting is **mixed and unmanaged**: warm tungsten desk lamp pools golden light across the keyboard and desk surface; a single cool daylight window upper-right backlights the shelves and grazes the left side of her figure cold. No fill. Left-side shadows fall soft and uncorrected. Phone sensor adds mild digital grain in shadow areas, slightly warm color cast, gently crushed blacks — **real phone photo imperfection, not cinematic polish**. Composition slightly off-axis, desk edge cuts diagonally, clutter crowds every edge, foreground duvet partially obscures lower frame. The room has been lived in for years. She has been sitting here for hours. The world outside doesn't exist right now.

1. 核心布局：对称式焦点构图
左右对称：左右两侧各放置一个角色侧脸，形成镜像对峙感，强化 “对话 / 对抗” 的叙事感。
中心聚焦：顶部聚光灯向下投射渐变光柱，将视线牢牢锁定在画面中央的站立角色上，形成从上到下的强引导视觉流。
上下分区：
上半区：角色群像 + 渐变光柱，负责氛围与叙事。
下半区：大标题 + 辅助信息，负责品牌与信息传递。
2. 视觉层级优先级
中心站立角色（视觉核心，聚光灯 + 主体造型）
底部大标题「new battle」（文字核心，粗体 + 撞色 + 描边）
左右两侧侧脸角色（氛围辅助，丰富叙事层次）
侧边竖排文字 + 底部小字（信息补充，弱化处理）
二、色彩系统解析
1. 主色调：霓虹渐变 + 高对比
渐变光柱：从顶部的紫→蓝→青→绿，模拟舞台灯光，营造赛博氛围感。
角色配色：左侧蓝紫渐变 + 右侧黄绿渐变，形成冷暖对比，同时与中心光柱色彩呼应。
文字配色：白色粗体 + 黑色粗描边 + 绿色点缀，在深色背景下极具辨识度，符合潮流杂志的视觉冲击力。
2. 色彩逻辑
背景：深紫→黑的渐变，压低环境亮度，突出前景角色与光效。
光效：聚光灯 + 渐变光柱，是画面的 “视觉光源”，让角色仿佛置身舞台中央。
点缀色：红色（角色耳饰、法杖线条）、橙色（法杖装饰）作为高饱和点缀，打破冷色调的单调。
三、文字排版与信息层级
1. 标题区（底部核心）
主标题：A new battle awaits you!（大写））
字体：粗体无衬线 + 夸张的几何变形，带有黑色粗描边，视觉冲击力拉满。
排版：横向通栏，占据底部约 1/3 高度，是画面的 “文字锚点”。
装饰：右侧叠加绿色手写体Music，强化音乐主题；上方加入神秘符号文字，增加赛博神秘感。
副标题：When words fail, battle begins.（大写）
字体：细体无衬线，白色，居中放置在主标题下方，作为品牌 Slogan。
时间标识：MAR.2023
放置在右下角，小字，明确杂志期数。
2. 侧边信息区（竖排）
左侧：RED SOUL MONOLOGUE
竖排排版，白色细体，与左侧蓝发角色绑定，暗示角色主题。
右侧：PADME'S ALBUM BATTLE FOR BEAUTY
竖排排版，白色细体，与右侧绿发角色绑定，传递专辑信息。
右上角：Jujutsu Academy Rookie
斜向排版，绿色字体，点明杂志属性，打破规整感。
1. 角色设计与排版
中心角色：完整立绘，姿态舒展（抬手 + 持杖），占据光柱核心区域，是画面的绝对主角。
两侧侧脸：仅展示头部与肩部，做半透明 / 渐变处理，避免抢镜，同时丰富画面层次，形成 “多角色叙事”。
风格统一：所有角色均采用日式二次元厚涂 + 赛博朋克元素（渐变发色、机能风服饰、金属配饰），视觉语言高度统一。
2. 装饰元素
聚光灯：顶部圆形灯源 + 放射状光线，模拟舞台追光，强化 “表演感”。
像素化光柱：阶梯状渐变 + 竖线光效，模拟老式电子屏幕 / 音波，呼应音乐主题。
几何纹理：顶部背景的棋盘格纹理，增加复古赛博质感。
五、设计亮点总结
强叙事感：通过对称角色 + 中心主角，构建 “对峙→表演” 的故事线，让海报不止是视觉，更是一段微型剧情。
高辨识度：粗体大标题 + 霓虹渐变光效，在信息流中极易被捕捉，符合杂志封面的传播需求。
风格融合：将日式二次元的柔美与赛博朋克的冷峻完美结合，形成独特的 “潮流二次元” 视觉语言。
信息清晰：严格区分核心信息（标题、主角）与辅助信息（角色名、期数），阅读效率极高。

title: [BRAND NAME] + [HERO COLOR]
prompt:
[BRAND NAME] + [HERO COLOR]

Act as a Mixed-Media Campaign Art Director. Your specialty: combining studio photography cutouts with hand-drawn 2D illustration where the real human and the drawn object physically interact — touching, holding, standing on, leaning against, or using the illustrated element as if it truly exists in their space.

PHASE 1: CANVAS & COLOR SYSTEM

Format: 1:1 square canvas. Base: single flat saturated color [HERO COLOR]. No gradients. No texture. Pure chromatic field.
Overlay: 3–4 organic amoeba blob shapes in the same [HERO COLOR] but 20% darker in value. Smooth edges, irregular silhouettes, scattered asymmetrically. Some bleeding off-frame.
Hand-painted feel, clean execution.

PHASE 2: AUTONOMOUS OBJECT SELECTION

BEFORE staging the scene, the AI must first  make two autonomous decisions:
DECISION 1 — SELECT THE OBJECT: Analyze [BRAND NAME] and identify ONE iconic physical object from this framework:
— What is the single most recognizable product or artifact this brand has ever made?
— What object do fans of this brand collect, use daily, or photograph?
— What prop has defined this brand's visual identity across decades?
Do NOT choose animals. Do NOT choose logos. Choose a real, large, tangible object that can physically occupy space next to a person.
DECISION 2 — SELECT THE INTERACTION: Based on the chosen object, determine the most natural and visually dynamic way the real model can directly interact with the drawn object.
Interaction must be:
✓ Physical and direct — hands touching, feet on, body leaning, arms around
✓ Immediately readable — the relationship between person and object is understood in under 2 seconds
✓ Scaled correctly — the object must be large enough to interact with at human scale
✓ Active, not passive — the model is DOING something with the object, not just standing next to it
INTERACTION TYPE EXAMPLES (AI selects the most brand-appropriate):
· HOLDING: model's real hands grip the illustrated object — cup, camera, trophy, bottle, bag
· WEARING/USING: model's real body wears or uses the object — sitting on a chair, wearing an illustrated hat, holding an illustrated product to their face
· STANDING ON: model's real feet are planted on top of the illustrated object — skateboard, surfboard, podium, giant sneaker
· RIDING/LEANING: model's real body leans against or drapes over the illustrated object — car hood, shopping cart, giant product silhouette
· EMERGING FROM: model appears to step out of or through the illustrated object — bursting through a giant sneaker box, rising from an illustrated cup

PHASE 3: STAGING THE SCENE

Once object and interaction are selected, stage the full scene:
MODEL:
Single model age 18–26, clean cutout, zero fringing. Pose is determined by the chosen interaction — the body position must make the interaction feel natural and physically believable.
Wardrobe: [BRAND NAME]'s most iconic apparel in [HERO COLOR] monochromatic palette.
ILLUSTRATED OBJECT: Pure white (#FFFFFF) flat 2D illustration. Brush-pen marker line quality, 3–5px weight. Slightly imperfect organic edges — hand-drawn feel, not vector-perfect. NO shading. NO gradients. Flat white fill only.

SCALE RULE — CRITICAL: The illustrated object must be LARGE. Minimum size: 40% of canvas height. The object should feel monumental — oversized relative to real-world scale  is acceptable and encouraged.  A coffee cup can be waist-height.  A sneaker can be as tall as the model. Large scale = better readability =  stronger visual impact.
DEPTH LAYERING — CRITICAL:The object must exist on multiple z-layers:
— Parts of the object sit BEHIND the model
— Parts of the object come IN FRONT of the model
— The model's real hands/feet make contact  at the intersection point
This layering is what makes the scene feel integrated rather than collaged.
BRAND STAMP:
One small [BRAND NAME] logo mark appears on the object's surface — naturally embedded as if printed, engraved, or stitched. Rendered in [HERO COLOR] darker variant. Subtle, not dominant.

PHASE 4: SUPPORTING ILLUSTRATION SYSTEM

All supporting elements: white, flat, brush-pen line style. Same visual language as the hero object.
LOGO MARKS:
[BRAND NAME] primary icon in white:
— Large (upper-left corner, ~15% canvas width)
— Medium (opposite corner, ~10% canvas width)
IMPACT MARKERS: 2–3 manga-style exclamation dash clusters  near the point of interaction between  model and object — where hands grip,  where feet land, where bodies touch. This emphasizes the physical connection.
MOTION LINES: 2–4 curved speed lines radiating from  the object or the model's most active body part. Taper at ends. Cross behind and in front of the model for depth.

GROUND EFFECT: At the base of the scene: white illustrated  ground interaction — sparkle stars,  short speed dashes, or object-specific  effect (splash if cup, dust clouds  if sneaker landing, wheel tracks if skateboard).
AMBIENT SQUIGGLES: 1–2 loose organic white lines floating near the model's torso — visual rhythm connecting the photographic and illustrated layers.

PHASE 5: LIGHTING

Studio strobe, high-key, even and clean. 5500K neutral. No dramatic shadows on model. Soft contact shadow at model's feet (opacity 15%). The photography reads as natural and real  against the graphic illustrated environment.

TECH SPECS

Aesthetic: mixed media — real photograph integrated with hand-drawn 2D illustration. Color count: 3 maximum — [HERO COLOR] light, [HERO COLOR] dark blobs, white illustration. Photography skin tones and fabric colors  are the only additional color exception. Illustration style: Y2K comic energy,  Japanese streetwear magazine, brush marker. Composition: asymmetric and dynamic.  The interaction point between model and  object is the visual center of gravity — everything else orbits around it. No text. No wordmarks. Logo icon only. Mood: the model is not posing WITH the object —  the model is IN THE MIDDLE of using it.  Caught mid-action. Alive.

title: "subject": {
SOFT NOIR MINIMALISM — IDENTITY PRESERVED
prompt:
SOFT NOIR MINIMALISM — IDENTITY PRESERVED
A softly lit studio portrait of the same woman from the reference image (photo 1 & 2), maintaining her natural facial features, skin tone, and identity. She is styled with an elegant loose updo hairstyle inspired by the reference pose, with soft strands framing her face, while keeping her original natural dark brown hair color.
She wears a sheer black mesh top layered over a fitted camisole, featuring delicate lace trim at the collar and subtle transparency across the shoulders. A thin black choker necklace adds a refined minimal accessory.
The lighting is soft and diffused, gently illuminating her natural complexion and creating smooth highlights on the face with balanced shadows. Her expression is calm and confident with a relaxed editorial gaze.
The background is smooth neutral gray studio backdrop, clean and minimal, emphasizing contrast between the dark clothing and her natural features.
Captured from a slightly high, centered camera angle at chest height, with chest-up framing that highlights facial symmetry and neckline.
The overall mood is calm, intimate, editorial, evoking refined modern minimalism with cinematic depth and natural texture fidelity.

Structure (Optimized for Image Models)
Finish
Editorial realism, matte texture, natural skin texture, realistic color grading
Subject Style
Woman from reference image, dark brown hair in loose elegant updo, soft strands framing face, sheer black mesh top, thin black choker
Scene Type
Minimalist studio portrait
Lighting
Soft diffused studio lighting, balanced shadows, gentle highlights, cinematic softness
Camera Composition
Slightly high centered angle, chest-up framing, shallow depth of field, 85mm portrait lens
Mood & Tone
Elegant, calm, intimate, soft noir minimalism

Negative prompt
overly smooth skin, plastic skin, extra fingers, distorted face, cartoon style, anime, heavy makeup, harsh lighting, blur, low resolution

title: A woman seated on a clean studio floor wearing a sleek black one-piece swimsuit
prompt: A woman seated on a clean studio floor wearing a sleek black one-piece swimsuit with geometric cutout details on the shoulders and neckline, paired with black ankle socks. She sits in a relaxed, reclined pose with legs extended and bent at the knees, one hand placed behind her supporting her torso while the other rests on the floor, torso turned slightly toward the camera with head tilted back looking over her shoulder. The setting features a minimalist studio environment with a seamless light gray backdrop and matching floor creating an infinite background effect. Professional studio lighting produces soft, even illumination with minimal shadows, giving the image a clean, commercial aesthetic. Shot at eye level from a low angle, the full-body composition captures the subject from head to toe in a fashion editorial style. The overall mood is polished and contemporary with a focus on activewear or swimwear presentation, emphasizing the garment's design details and creating a sophisticated, catalog-ready photograph with a modern, minimalist approach.

title: 【核心要求】
prompt:
【核心要求】
ARRI/RED电影机实拍建筑影像，大画幅电影传感器质感，参考徐克武侠电影视觉美学，非CG渲染，画面中出现写实人物，人物真实准确无畸形
【电影参考】
视觉风格参考：《新龙门客栈》《黄飞鸿》《笑傲江湖之东方不败》《狄仁杰之神都龙王》《蜀山传》
影调气质：徐克的浪漫主义武侠诗意，水墨画意境，苍凉大气与飘逸灵动并存
构图气质：保持原图构图结构，人物融入场景之中
【电影机与镜头】
ARRI Alexa 65或RED Monstro 8K VV大画幅电影机
蔡司Supreme Prime或安琴Optimo电影定焦镜头
T2.8-T4光圈，全程深锐利，画面纯净无噪点
ISO 800-1600原生感光度，15档宽容度
透视与原图一致，横平竖直无畸变
【人物要求】
写实人物，真实人体结构，比例准确
五官端正，表情自然，神态符合场景氛围
肢体正常，手指数量正确，关节自然
服装质感真实，与建筑环境协调
人物在画面中比例适当，不突兀
【光影】
戏剧化侧逆光或逆光，营造剪影与轮廓光
参考《新龙门客栈》大漠孤烟的苍茫光线
或《狄仁杰》系列的神秘雾气氛围
光影对比强烈，层次分明
人物身上有自然的轮廓光或明暗过渡
【材质细腻表现】
青砖黛瓦：岁月侵蚀痕迹，青苔斑驳，瓦片纹理清晰
木质结构：风化纹理，榫卯细节，漆面剥落的时间感
石材基座：风化肌理，凿痕细节，沧桑质感
金属构件：铜绿氧化，铁锈痕迹，古铜光泽
白墙灰瓦：墙面细微裂纹，水墨般的黑白灰层次
雾气在建筑材质表面的柔化效果
【电影级色调 - 徐克武侠美学】
整体水墨画意色调，低饱和高对比
黛青（深蓝灰）与赭石（暖棕）的经典对比
暗部偏墨青或深褐，高光微暖如夕阳余晖
朱砂红或暗金作为点缀色
苍凉大气的江湖色调，诗意而神秘
ARRI LogC3色彩科学，电影级LUT调色
【画面质感】
电影机实拍清晰锐利，无胶片颗粒，无噪点
人物与建筑材质纹理真实细腻，边缘干净分明
徐克式的浪漫主义武侠氛围
电影截图级品质，苍凉诗意，大气磅礴

title: 【构图要求】
prompt:
【构图要求】
- 左侧放置全身或半身照片的主角（时尚街拍风）
- 右侧以白底排版列出所有单品
- 每件单品包含：物品图、品牌名、中文品名、价格
- 布局整洁、有呼吸感，时尚杂志风格
	
【视觉风格】
- 明亮自然街拍光线
- 真实质感的衣物贴图，呈现清晰材质
- 右侧采用电商风格白底商品照
- 字体干净现代（类似无衬线字体）
- 整体专业、极简、精致
	
【人物说明】
- 东亚女性角色，时髦、有气质
- 穿着：白色裹身挂脖上衣、浅灰系带半身裙、银色简约项链、白色花朵发夹、金色系戒指
- 造型自然，像真人街拍
	
【单品列表排版】
- 以独立小模块方式呈现每件单品
- 每件单品包括：
- 商品照（剪影风）
- 品牌名（英文或中文）
- 品名（中文）
- 价格（人民币）
	
【整体风格方向】
- 像小红书/微博时尚博主常用的 OOTD 拼贴
- 风格年轻、日常、好看、实用
- 色调统一且具有品牌感

title: 主题设定：超逼真的电影感肖像，高端时尚，8K质感，画幅杂志风格摄影。
prompt:
主题设定：超逼真的电影感肖像，高端时尚，8K质感，画幅杂志风格摄影。
主体描述：仅使用上传的参考图1作为主要拍摄对象，面部特征、骨骼结构和自然肤质（可见毛孔）需100%匹配，妆容与参考图角色保持一致。不得改变种族或性别特征。
发型描述：与参考图1人物的发型和发色保持高度一致，发丝被风吹拂，飘散在脸上，以时尚的方式部分遮挡面部特征。
妆容设定：
1 底妆：通透干净，轻薄雾面带微光
2 腮红：粉色集中在脸颊与鼻梁两侧
3 眼妆：自然放大，睫毛纤长，眼神清澈
4 唇妆：水润嘟嘟唇，淡粉到蜜桃渐变，唇峰柔和
超逼真的皮肤纹理，毛孔清晰可见，细节自然，纹理细腻。
服装设定：与参考图1人物的上身穿搭保持高度一致，下身换成紧身的牛仔裤，黑色亮面尖头细跟的高跟鞋。
场景/环境：参考图1为场景参考，时间为夏天，充满欧洲风格，一个复古公寓的门，门打开着，旁边是复古的小店。
动作/动态：前景有穿着时尚的行人人快速移动，动态模糊（长曝光效果）挡住部分画面和镜头。拍摄对象保持完美清晰、沉静。拍摄对象静止，轻微仰头，媚态看着镜头，（时尚杂志模特的post）位于画面的右侧。
构图：低角度仰拍人物，全身横幅肖像，主体人物位置偏右构图，线条简洁流畅
相机：24mm广角镜头视角，浅景深，电影感虚化效果，专业的时尚写实风格。
光照：柔和的电影感光照，暖色调，营造氛围感。高光控制得当，阴影保留细节。
色彩/后期：高细节，高级色彩分级，自然的肤质纹理，微妙的胶片感（无明显颗粒）。无文字、无徽标、无水印。
画面比例『』，2K HD 输出

title: Aesthetic collage artwork with a torn paper background and wooden texture at the
prompt:
Aesthetic collage artwork with a torn paper background and wooden texture at the top. In the center, a cute 3D animated girl with big expressive green eyes, round glasses, and a messy bun hairstyle, joyfully jumping with arms raised. She is wearing a chunky green knitted cardigan, a cream crop top, loose beige pastel pants, sneakers, and a small brown shoulder bag.
Surround her with colorful graffiti-style splashes, doodles, and icons like hearts, smiley faces, stars, lightning bolts, and spray paint elements. Add the text “NOOR 🌸” at the top in large pastel bubble letters with soft gradients and a flower replacing the “O”, blended aesthetically into the background.
Include layered paper textures at the bottom with partially visible book text and torn edges. Bright pastel colors, soft lighting, high detail, vibrant, modern aesthetic, clean composition, 4k quality.
