title: A theatrical portrait of a jester-like surreal figure standing beneath spotlight
prompt: A theatrical portrait of a jester-like surreal figure standing beneath spotlight darkness, dressed in elaborate garments patterned with checkerboards, eyes, ladders, and impossible stair motifs. Their costume seems tailored from flat graphic shapes, yet folds naturally into dimensional fabric. The face is divided into sections like hinged panels, each rotated slightly differently so the expression changes from angle to angle. A tall collar rises behind the head and forms a miniature stage set where tiny actors perform on balconies and ramps. One gloved hand presents a crystal sphere containing an upside-down city, while the other hand disappears into a painted doorway on the figure’s own chest. The background resembles a simple curtain until its shadows reveal additional hidden faces and architecture. The image should feel playful, eerie, clever, and visually dense, with surreal portrait drama, illusionistic costume design, polished detail, sharp theatrical lighting, rich symbolism, and a layered sense that the figure is both performer and stage, both person and perfectly constructed visual trick.

title: 一张极具感官诱惑力的 8k 商业微距摄影，聚焦于 [在此处填入你的主题，如：一块刚刚炸好的脆皮炸鸡 / 一杯加满冰块的苏打水 / 一抹涂抹开的丝绒口红]的高光时
prompt:
一张极具感官诱惑力的 8k 商业微距摄影，聚焦于 [在此处填入你的主题，如：一块刚刚炸好的脆皮炸鸡 / 一杯加满冰块的苏打水 / 一抹涂抹开的丝绒口红]的高光时刻。
动态与构图：
画面捕捉了物体**[选择一种动态：发生碰撞 / 汁水飞溅 / 缓慢流淌 / 刚刚被切开]**的瞬间。这不是静止的摆拍，而是充满了爆发力的动态定格。构图极度聚焦，主体几乎填满画面，带来强烈的视觉压迫感和满足感。
极致的感官细节：
重点刻画材质的物理诱惑力。
(如果是食物)：强调表面的焦化色泽、正在滴落的晶莹油脂/水珠、升腾的丝丝热气，以及撒落的调味碎屑，隔着屏幕都能感受到酥脆或多汁的口感。
(如果是产品)：强调表面的颗粒度、液体的流动张力或完美的倒角光泽。
光影氛围：
采用高对比度的商业布光（Rembrandt Lighting 或硬光直射），光源色彩温暖而饱满。背景是[描述背景，如：深色的虚化背景 / 与主体互补的高饱和纯色]，以最大程度衬托主体的鲜活色彩。画面锐度极高，每一滴飞溅的微粒都清晰可辨。

title: 一张极具感官张力的 8K 夜景商业海报人像，聚焦于年轻女性在巨大城市地标前被强直闪切出的冷白面部与唇部高光瞬间。画面核心不是风景，而是“强闪打亮的脸”和“被压暗
prompt:
一张极具感官张力的 8K 夜景商业海报人像，聚焦于年轻女性在巨大城市地标前被强直闪切出的冷白面部与唇部高光瞬间。画面核心不是风景，而是“强闪打亮的脸”和“被压暗的巨型背景”之间的反差快感。

动态与构图：人物在夜风中轻微转身，发丝被吹起，镜头于低机位仰拍中定格她向下看来的瞬间。主体不一定贴满全画面，但脸、胸肩、腿部高光必须像刀一样从黑暗里切出来，形成巨大压迫感。

极致感官细节：重点刻画冷白皮在强闪下的伪发光质感、唇部的缎光反射、发丝边缘的利光、眼下与鼻梁被直闪击中的清晰高点、服装硬边与金属件的锐利反射。背景中的地标保持巨大、干净、压迫，但绝不抢脸。

光影氛围：主体使用强直闪，背景保留自然夜景暗部层次与月晕或雾气氛围，形成典型“直闪切主体 + 夜景压暗 + 高级冷感 glow”的商业海报逻辑。

画面右侧安全边距加入垂直极细"voxcat"（hairline超细、低对比暗灰蓝、字距略松、小到指甲盖大小，绝不抢主体），旁边一个青金石蓝小圆点（哑光、无发光、不像UI按钮），签名像版面设计细节而不是水印。

风格：冷感夜景商业海报，CCD 直闪成像语言，真实摄影，高锐度，高对比，压迫构图，人物强气场，不要霓虹杂乱，不要背景抢主，不要暖黄脏肤色

title: A high-definition, clean, minimalist board / turnaround reference sheet, set aga
prompt:
A high-definition, clean, minimalist board / turnaround reference sheet, set against a pure white background. The overall presentation should resemble a fashion design reference page, character design sheet, or character turnaround board. The layout should be neat and well-organized, with clearly divided information sections, a realistic and premium visual quality, consistent lighting, and strict character consistency throughout.

On the left side of the composition, show the character’s full-body three-view turnaround, occupying the main visual area, including:
1. Front full-body standing pose
2. Left-side full-body standing pose
3. Back full-body standing pose

All three figures must be the exact same character, with identical facial features, hairstyle, clothing, body shape, and height proportions. The standing pose should feel natural, with both arms hanging naturally at the sides. This should be suitable as a character modeling reference. The camera angle should be eye level, with neutral studio lighting, no obstruction, no exaggerated perspective, and no complex background.

The right side of the composition should be divided into two sections:

In the upper-right section, place six headshot / head-angle reference images of the same character, arranged neatly to show different head perspectives, including:
- Front-facing portrait
- Slight downward angle showing the top of the head
- Back of the head / rear head view
- Left-side facial profile
- A near-side-angle comparison view (this line was slightly unclear in the source and may not be exact)
- 3/4 profile portrait

The head references should have clear facial features, visible hair parting, and consistent facial structure, making them suitable as head design references.

In the lower-right section, place six close-up detail images of the character, arranged into a clean grid, showing key design details, including:
- Close-up of the upper garment fabric texture
- Front close-up of the lower-body clothing
- Close-up of the hip / tailoring detail
- Close-up of the leg or skin texture detail
- Close-up of the eyes or facial feature details
- Full close-up of the shoes as a standalone item

All detail images must match the main character’s outfit and appearance exactly. Materials should look realistic, and the details should be clean and precise, suitable as clothing and accessory modeling references.

Overall style requirements:
Minimalist, professional, realistic, unified, clean, and premium, fashion design reference sheet, or character turnaround presentation board. The character edges should be sharp, garment shapes should be clearly defined, hair strands should appear natural, and material rendering should be accurate. The overall layout should have generous white space.

Character setup:
[Character appearance description]

Output requirements:
Landscape composition, white background, full character visible, no cropping, no extra props, no explanatory text, no logo, no watermark, no UI interface elements, no like/save buttons, and no social-media-screenshot appearance.

title: Create a premium open-graph hero image for [BRAND]:
prompt:
Create a premium open-graph hero image for [BRAND]:

A wide horizontal layout (16:9 ratio) designed for social sharing, website headers, and marketing collateral. This is a high-end designer mockup presentation suitable for a branding portfolio or product launch. The focus is on clarity, balance, negative space and visual confidence.

LAYOUT STRUCTURE:

The composition is split into two clear zones with generous breathing room between them.

LEFT ZONE:
The [BRAND] logo and brand name are placed in the top-left corner. The logo is sized appropriately for the format, not too large, not too small. It reads clearly but doesn't dominate.

Below the logo, a single large headline is set in a clean, modern sans-serif typeface. The headline is short, typically 3-6 words maximum. It is confident, left-aligned, and sits comfortably within the left third of the canvas. The text color is derived from the brand palette.

RIGHT ZONE:
One floating, rounded rectangular panel suggesting a product interface, dashboard, or app screen. The panel has subtle depth, either through a soft drop shadow or slight elevation effect. The contents of the panel are suggestive rather than detailed, hinting at functionality without clutter.

The panel is angled very slightly or presented straight-on depending on what feels most balanced. It floats naturally in the composition, grounded by its shadow but with clear separation from the background.

NEGATIVE SPACE:
Strong use of negative space throughout. The background is clean and uncluttered. There is clear visual breathing room between the left text block and the right interface panel. Nothing feels cramped or crowded.

COLOR & STYLE:
Colors are drawn directly from the [BRAND] palette. The background can be a brand color, white, off-white, or a subtle gradient that complements the brand.

The overall style is flat or near-flat. No heavy gradients, no glossy effects, no 3D renders. Shadows are subtle and serve only to create gentle depth. Typography is modern, confident, and legible at small sizes.

MOOD & FEEL:
Clean SaaS homepage hero. Quiet confidence. The image should feel premium, polished and intentional. Every element is placed with purpose. The overall impression is of a company that knows what it's doing.

WHAT TO AVOID:
No stock photo elements. No people. No complex illustrations. No decorative graphics or patterns. No multiple interface panels. No visual noise. No text other than the headline and brand name. No borders or frames around the image.

OUTPUT:
A single 16:9 image with no watermarks, no mockup frames, and no external branding. Ready to use as an open-graph image, social header, or presentation slide.

title: Using the attached reference image, generate a hyper realistic 8K portrait while
prompt:
Using the attached reference image, generate a hyper realistic 8K portrait while keeping the subject’s exact face, facial structure, and caramel skin tone completely unchanged, with zero distortion or alteration.
Subject: An African chubby woman in her late 30s with a confident and commanding presence.
Hair and Makeup: black  hair styled with a sleek side part and neatly laid baby hairs. Makeup is soft glam with well defined brows, contoured cheeks, subtle highlight, and glossy ombre lips. The overall finish is polished, elegant, and age appropriate.
Outfit: A lemon green two piece suit consisting of a tailored blazer and matching trousers. The blazer features refined beaded or sequined lapels that catch the studio lighting subtly, giving a premium couture feel.
Accessories: A layered diamond or crystal choker necklace, large hoop earrings, stacked bracelets and a wristwatch.
Pose and Expression: She is seated behind a professional studio microphone, captured mid conversation in an animated and expressive talking moment. Her hands are slightly gesturing, posture relaxed yet authoritative. She is looking slightly off camera to the left. The energy is boss lady, confident, expressive, and influential.
Setting: A professional studio space inside a penthouse style hall. The environment feels modern and upscale, with clean architectural lines, subtle acoustic panels, warm studio lighting, and a controlled indoor atmosphere.
Photography Style: High end studio flash photography with strong clarity and contrast. Sharp focus on the subject, balanced lighting on the face, and a slightly subdued background for depth. Ultra realistic, editorial quality, luxury broadcast aesthetic, 8K resolution.

AI Avatar
I can help generate a detailed prompt for an AI art generator based on your description, but I cannot create the image myself. Here's a comprehensive prompt you can use:

Prompt for AI Image Generator:

Create a hyper-realistic, ultra-detailed 8K portrait of an African woman in her late 30s with a confident and commanding presence. The subject has a caramel skin tone, a full face, and a strong facial structure. She has black and red hair styled with a sleek side part and neatly laid baby hairs. Her makeup is soft glam: well-defined brows, contoured cheeks with subtle highlights, and glossy ombre lips. The overall look is polished, elegant, and age-appropriate.

She is seated behind a professional studio microphone, captured mid-conversation in an animated, expressive talking moment. Her hands are slightly gesturing, her posture relaxed yet authoritative, and she is looking slightly off-camera to the left. The background shows a modern, upscale studio inside a penthouse-style hall with clean architectural lines, subtle acoustic panels, warm studio lighting, and a controlled indoor atmosphere.

She wears a lemon-green two-piece suit comprising a tailored blazer with refined beaded or sequined lapels that subtly catch the studio lighting, and matching trousers. Accessories include a layered diamond or crystal choker necklace, large hoop earrings, stacked bracelets, and a stylish wristwatch.

The lighting style is high-end studio flash with strong clarity and contrast, sharp focus on the face, balanced lighting, and a slightly subdued background for depth. The overall aesthetic exudes luxury, professionalism, and confidence.

title: Ultra-detailed studio product render of a LEGO Technic style vehicle model based

The LEGO build must replicate the real vehicle's exact shape, proportions, bodylines, color scheme, headlights, grille design, wheels, and overall silhouette while constructed entirely from realistic LEGO Technic pieces and panels.
The vehicle is displayed in a clean professional product photography studio setup, placed on a smooth matte surface. Behind the car stands a large LEGO Technic product box, slightly blurred but clearly recognizable as a premium building kit package.
The vehicle features aggressive widebody styling, large sport wheels, low stance, detailed front splitter, and a roof rack cargo box built from LEGO elements, maintaining the same design style as the reference vehicle.
In front of the vehicle on the table are organized LEGO Technic components and tools, including small tires, axles, connectors, battery modules, rods, mechanical pieces, scissors, and miniature assembly tools, arranged neatly like a build kit.

8K resolution, ultra sharp, photorealistic render, cinematic lighting, professional product shot

title: Analyze the attached image, extract the main subject's core recognizable feature
prompt:
Analyze the attached image, extract the main subject's core recognizable features (such as hairstyle, clothing, accessories, and colors), and transform them into a minimalist, super-deformed (chibi) pixel art character.
​[CRITICAL: Ultra-Low Resolution Famicom Style]
​Chunky Pixels: The character MUST look like a classic 8-bit NES/Famicom game sprite. You must use extremely large, chunky, blocky, and highly visible square pixels.
​Low Grid Constraint: Design the character as if it is restricted to a tiny 32x32 pixel grid that has been scaled up. Every individual "pixel" block must be huge and obvious. Do NOT create detailed or high-resolution pixel art.
​No Anti-Aliasing: ABSOLUTELY NO anti-aliasing. All diagonal lines and curves must have severe, raw, jagged "staircase" steps.
​[Strict Aesthetic Rules]
​Outlines: Use thick, harsh, stark black, heavily pixelated outlines for all shapes.
​Coloring: Use a highly restricted palette of flat, solid colors only. There must be ABSOLUTELY NO shading, highlights, blending, or gradients.
​Facial Features: Maximum simplicity. Use just a single large black pixel block for each eye, and maybe one pixel for a blush.
​Sticker Effect: Enclose the entire character with a thick, solid pure white pixelated border.
​Background: Automatically select a single, solid, flat background color (such as a vibrant or pastel hue) that matches the subject's vibe.

title: Super close up, extra details, low quality night selfie. In a vertical 9:16 reve
prompt: Super close up, extra details, low quality night selfie. In a vertical 9:16 reverie, the canvas is dominated by the luminous presence of a young woman in her early twenties, her features a study in ethereal symmetry and porcelain grace characteristic of Northern European frost. Her face is framed by a cascading veil of long, platinum blonde hair that catches a warm, golden light from the side, creating a halo of delicate, stray wisps that dance against the deep, obsidian void of the night. Her eyes, deep and captivating with a subtle feline tilt, are accentuated by soft, winged eyeliner and a hint of shimmer at the inner corners, gazing forward with a tranquil, mesmerizing depth. The skin of her face is flawless and radiant, possessing a soft-focus perfection that highlights high, elegant cheekbones and a straight, refined nose. Her lips, full and naturally flushed with a dusty rose hue, are set in a soft, enigmatic expression that enhances her supermodel-like allure. She is dressed in a simple white top layered under a heather gray zip-up hoodie, the metallic teeth of the zipper catching the light and adding a tactile contrast to the softness of her hair and skin. Her build appears lithe and delicate, posed with a natural poise that commands the frame even in this intimate close-up. The light source, positioned to her right, casts a gentle gradient of warmth across her features while leaving the left side in a soft, cinematic shadow, rooting the composition in a moment of quiet, nocturnal beauty.

title: A high-definition, clean, minimalist character design board / character turnarou
prompt:
A high-definition, clean, minimalist character design board / character turnaround reference sheet, set against a pure white background. The overall presentation should resemble a professional game art character modeling sheet, fashion design reference page, character design sheet, or character turnaround board. The layout should be neat and well-organized, with clearly divided information sections, a realistic and premium visual quality, consistent lighting, and strict character consistency throughout.

On the left side of the composition, show the character’s full-body three-view turnaround, occupying the main visual area, including:
1. Front full-body standing pose
2. Left-side full-body standing pose
3. Back full-body standing pose

All three figures must be the exact same character, with identical facial features, hairstyle, clothing, body shape, and height proportions. The standing pose should feel natural, with both arms hanging naturally at the sides. This should be suitable as a character modeling reference. The camera angle should be eye level, with neutral studio lighting, no obstruction, no exaggerated perspective, and no complex background.

The right side of the composition should be divided into two sections:

In the upper-right section, place six headshot / head-angle reference images of the same character, arranged neatly to show different head perspectives, including:
- Front-facing portrait
- Slight downward angle showing the top of the head
- Back of the head / rear head view
- Left-side facial profile
- A near-side-angle comparison view (this line was slightly unclear in the source and may not be exact)
- 3/4 profile portrait

The head references should have clear facial features, visible hair parting, and consistent facial structure, making them suitable as head design references.

In the lower-right section, place six close-up detail images of the character, arranged into a clean grid, showing key design details, including:
- Close-up of the upper garment fabric texture
- Front close-up of the lower-body clothing
- Close-up of the hip / tailoring detail
- Close-up of the leg or skin texture detail
- Close-up of the eyes or facial feature details
- Full close-up of the shoes as a standalone item

All detail images must match the main character’s outfit and appearance exactly. Materials should look realistic, and the details should be clean and precise, suitable as clothing and accessory modeling references.

Overall style requirements:
Minimalist, professional, realistic, unified, clean, and premium, similar to a character design board, fashion design reference sheet, 3D character modeling reference page, or character turnaround presentation board. The character edges should be sharp, garment shapes should be clearly defined, hair strands should appear natural, skin should look refined, and material rendering should be accurate. The overall layout should have generous white space, as if it were made by a professional concept art team.

Character setup:
[Character appearance description]

Output requirements:
Landscape composition, white background, full character visible, no cropping, no extra props, no explanatory text, no logo, no watermark, no UI interface elements, no like/save buttons, and no social-media-screenshot appearance.

title: Objective: Use the supplied reference image of the person to generate a professi
prompt:
Objective: Use the supplied reference image of the person to generate a professional, technical character reference sheet. The output must exactly match the subject's identity, realism, textures, and overall aesthetic.

Layout: Present on a solid, neutral gray background in two horizontal rows. 
Top Row: Four full-body A-pose views in this order: front, left profile, right profile, and back. 
Bottom Row: Three detailed headshot portraits aligned beneath the top row: front, left profile, and right profile.

Technical Specs: Maintain identical character features, consistent scale, and perfect head-height alignment across all seven panels. Use flat, uniform studio lighting to preserve detail in the shadows. Ensure a clean, symmetrical silhouette with sharp rendering, crisp edges, and print-ready, high-fidelity details.
